title: StartupLive'26 ViennaUP
location: HOIV - Home of Innovation, Arsenalstrasse 11, 1030, Vienna
descriptionFull:
Two Days. Limitless Potential. One Transformational Experience.

Join StartupLive’26 ViennaUP and immerse yourself in two days of innovation, collaboration, and competition within Vienna’s dynamic startup ecosystem.

Whether you’re a founder with a bold idea or a professional in tech, design, marketing, or business, this is your opportunity to build something meaningful alongside ambitious creators and experienced mentors.

Day 1 focuses on connection and creation. Founders deliver fast-paced 90-second pitches, followed by focused workshops and mentoring to refine business models, sharpen strategy, and strengthen startups.

Day 2 focuses on refinement and performance, with pitch training and financing workshops, followed by live competition in front of investors and corporate leaders.

Professionals (attendees) are invited to contribute their skills and co-create with early-stage founders. Startups gain direct access to mentors, investors, and Vienna’s startup ecosystem.

Visitors are welcome to join the final pitch event and experience the future of entrepreneurship live.

title: Europe Tech Hackathon
location: ÖBB Open Innovation Factory, Foyer 1 Ecke, Lassallestraße, Joseph-Roth-Gasse 5, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull:
The Europe Tech Hackathon is an intensive, hands-on innovation experience for people who want to turn ideas into real impact. In Vienna, interdisciplinary teams work on concrete sustainability challenges using technology, AI and data.

Throughout the hackathon, participants benefit from experienced mentors from tech, business and sustainability who actively support teams in sharpening ideas, validating assumptions and building functional prototypes. The results are presented to a professional jury of industry and innovation experts, who provide honest, constructive feedback focused on impact, feasibility and scalability.

More than a competition, the Europe Tech Hackathon is a unique experience: intense collaboration, rapid learning, strong community spirit and the energy of creating something meaningful together. Join if you want to build, learn and connect.

We’ll tackle pressing challenges in sustainability, shaping solutions that create real-world impact. 0 Zum Inhalt springen Home Services Digitaler Produktpass ESG Analyse Product Carbon Footprint Klimawandelanpassung CSRD & Datenanalyse Hackathon Blog Kontakt Einloggen Konto Menü öffnen Menü schließen Home Services Digitaler Produktpass ESG Analyse Product Carbon Footprint Klimawandelanpassung CSRD & Datenanalyse Hackathon Blog Kontakt Einloggen Konto Menü öffnen Menü schließen Home Ordner: Services Zurück Digitaler Produktpass ESG Analyse Product Carbon Footprint Klimawandelanpassung CSRD & Datenanalyse Hackathon Blog Kontakt Einloggen Konto AI & Sustainability From May 15 to 17, 2026 , the Europe Tech Hackathon 2026 welcomes designers, innovators, and tech enthusiasts to the ÖBB Open Innovation Factory in Vienna . As a proud part of ViennaUP , Europe’s most dynamic startup festival, and hosted by Sustainista , this event challenges you to redefine the potential of AI agents. Together, we’ll tackle pressing challenges in sustainability, shaping solutions that create real-world impact. No matter your background, this is your chance to innovate, collaborate, and make a difference. Take part and be part of the transformation! GET YOUR TICKETS HERE! What is a hackathon? A hackathon is a collaborative event where programmers, designers, and entrepreneurs come together to develop software or hardware projects, often within a tight timeframe, to solve specific challenges or create innovative solutions. The Europe Tech Hackathon, organized by Sustainista, stands out as the premier event by emphasizing sustainability in tech, attracting top-tier talent passionate about creating impactful, eco-conscious technologies. This hackathon offers a unique platform for cross-disciplinary collaboration, access to cutting-edge resources, and mentorship from industry leaders, fostering an environment where groundbreaking green solutions are born. Don’t hesitate. Start your partnership with Sustainista! The Challenges Challenge 1: Needs to be defined for 2026 Join Us as a Partner in Driving Europe’s Tech Future The Europe Tech Hackathon, powered by Sustainista, brings together the most forward-thinking minds in sustainability, data, and digital transformation. Set at the intersection of purpose and innovation, this high-impact event offers a unique platform to co-create practical solutions for pressing challenges—from climate tech to inclusive digital infrastructure. We are currently seeking sponsors and strategic partners who share our vision for a resilient and tech-enabled Europe. Challenge 2: Needs to be defined for 2026 Amplify Your Impact through Sponsorship As a partner, you will gain visibility among Europe’s leading innovators, connect with top talent, and shape the agenda on sustainable technology. Whether through branding, challenge co-creation, or mentoring, your organization can help foster a vibrant ecosystem of change-makers. We invite you to help make this event not only possible, but truly transformative. Draft Agenda I Europe Tech Hackathon 2026 Friday May 15th 2026 I Kick-off, Ideation, Team building I only for Hackers 15.00: Doors open at the venue I Gaia Chatbot prepares participants 16:00: Official Kick-off I Hackathon Introduction 16:45: Workshops I tailored to each challenge with our incredible mentors 17:45: Begin hacking I mentoring sessions 17:30 to 19.30 HR Corner: Apply at our partners such as TCI Consult Work until 23.00 (or longer at home) Saturday May 16th 2026 I Full Day Working I only for Hackers 9.00 Space opens 10.00 to 14.00 Mentoring from 15+ Mentors 17.00 Pitch Training I Pre-Selection of pitching projects Work until 23.00 (or longer at home) Sunday May 17th 2026 I Finalize your Project & Pitch I Public event 9.00 Space opens I Coffee by ViennaUP Coffee Roasters 10.00 Doors open for visitors I Pitch event 10.30 to 12.00 Pitch Session Start Jury Jan Juriga (Wirtschaftsagentur Wien) , Kati Schneeberger (BEJ) , Tobias Amesberger (TCI Consult) , Johannes Adler (Investor) . 12.30 Award Ceremony & Media corner Start your partnership Official Partners Sustainista GmbH - Dein Partner für die Nachhaltigkeitstransformation Wir unterstützen Dich ♡ Folge uns auf LinkedIn ! Visitors are welcome to join the final pitch event and experience the future of entrepreneurship live.

title: Europe Tech Hackathon
location: ÖBB Open Innovation Factory, Foyer 1 Ecke, Lassallestraße, Joseph-Roth-Gasse 5, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull:
The Europe Tech Hackathon is an intensive, hands-on innovation experience for people who want to turn ideas into real impact. In Vienna, interdisciplinary teams work on concrete sustainability challenges using technology, AI and data.

Throughout the hackathon, participants benefit from experienced mentors from tech, business and sustainability who actively support teams in sharpening ideas, validating assumptions and building functional prototypes. The results are presented to a professional jury of industry and innovation experts, who provide honest, constructive feedback focused on impact, feasibility and scalability.

More than a competition, the Europe Tech Hackathon is a unique experience: intense collaboration, rapid learning, strong community spirit and the energy of creating something meaningful together. Join if you want to build, learn and connect.

title: Impact Days
location: Rathaus Wien (City Hall Vienna), Friedrich-Schmidt-Platz 1, 1010, Vienna
descriptionFull:
This year, Impact Days invites a different way of engaging with the future. Not by predicting it, simplifying it, or choosing sides, but by shaping it consciously, within the real limits that define our time.

’Holding Tensions, Creating Impact’ is the guiding idea for Impact Days ’26.
As economic, ecological, technological, and social systems become increasingly intertwined, progress no longer comes from easy answers or single solutions. Impact Days ’26 is built around three core tensions shaping the impact economy today: Nature and Technology, Stability and Change, and Value Extraction and Regeneration. These are not problems to be solved, but relationships to be held, navigated, and designed with care.

Impact Days ’26 is a space for learning how to work in this complexity. It is about making trade-offs visible, holding opposing forces in relationships, and shaping futures that can endure within social and planetary limits. The conference brings together entrepreneurs, investors, leaders, and system builders who are ready to engage with responsibility rather than certainty.

Please get your ticket in the external ticket shop Get your Ticket Description This year, Impact Days invites a different way of engaging with the future. Not by predicting it, simplifying it, or choosing sides, but by shaping it consciously, within the real limits that define our time. Holding Tensions, Creating Impact is the guiding idea for Impact Days ’26. As economic, ecological, technological, and social systems become increasingly intertwined, progress no longer comes from easy answers or single solutions. Impact Days ’26 is built around three core tensions shaping the impact economy today: Nature and Technology, Stability and Change, and Value Extraction and Regeneration. These are not problems to be solved, but relationships to be held, navigated, and designed with care. Impact Days ’26 is a space for learning how to work in this complexity. It is about making trade-offs visible, holding opposing forces in relationships, and shaping futures that can endure within social and planetary limits. The conference brings together entrepreneurs, investors, leaders, and system builders who are ready to engage with responsibility rather than certainty. Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 18.05.2026 09:00 - 19.05.2026 12:00 Rathaus Wien (City Hall Vienna), Friedrich-Schmidt-Platz 1, 1010 Wien Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Impact Days '26 Impact Days 0 Skip to Content HOME ABOUT AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS Open Menu Close Menu HOME ABOUT AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS Open Menu Close Menu HOME ABOUT AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS Holding Tensions, Creating Impact. 18-19 May RATHAUS Vienna Value Extraction & Regeneration Value Extraction & Regeneration Value Extraction & Regeneration Stability & Change Stability & Change Stability & Change Nature & Technology Nature & Technology Nature & Technology Impact Days '26 Impact Days '26 Impact Days '26 Tensions Shaping the Impact Economy Nature and Technology Rather than treating nature, humans, and technology as separate domains, Impact Days ‘26 brings them into a single system. Nature sets the boundaries within which economies must operate. Humans bring values, judgment, care, and responsibility. Artificialsystems extend our capacity to sense, analyse, and act at scale. This tension is about integration rather than opposition. It asks how technologies, including artificial intelligence, can be designed to strengthen human agency and regenerate natural systems, rather than override, replace, or extract from them. Core question: How do we design technologies and systems that operate in service of human dignity and planetary health? Stability and Change Most economic and institutional systems are built on assumptions of stability, predictability, and control. The reality we face is one of accelerating change, complex feedback loops, and unintended consequences. Impact Days ‘26 explores how entrepreneurs, investors, and leaders can operate responsibly without the illusion of certainty. This includes rethinking metrics, governance models, and decision-making processes suited to complex adaptive systems; where not all outcomes can be forecast in advance. Core question: How do we lead, invest, and innovate when the most important outcomes cannot be fully predicted? Value Extraction and Regeneration Economic systems constantly move along a spectrum between value extraction and value regeneration. Extraction enables speed, efficiency, and concentration of returns, while regeneration sustains the social and ecological foundations on which long-term value creation depends. Anchored in the Donut Economy, this tension reframes success as operating within planetary boundaries while strengthening social foundations. Capital, enterprises, and innovation are examined not as ends in themselves, but as tools for long-term system health and resilience. Core question:What would it mean to design businesses and investments that leave systems better than they found them? We inspire, enable and connect entrepreneurs and their ecosystem. 200 new start-ups enabled 10 programs run 100 + events hosted 1000 + Members in 15 years What we do Memberships & Co-Working From community access to co-working, our memberships give you the space, resources, and connections to build what matters. Learn more Events Events that bring people together to exchange ideas, spark collaboration, and enable action. From interactive workshops to conferences that shape the future of impact. Join our events Programs Tailored programs that back entrepreneurs at every stage with expert mentorship, funding connections, and the know-how to scale both business and impact. Learn more Spaces Inspiring spaces designed for productivity, creativity, and exchange. Host your next meeting, workshop, or conference in the heart of Vienna. Learn more For 14 years, we have been bringing the impact ecosystem together at Austria’s largest impact event, Impact Days. In 2025, it brought together over 750 participants from 49 countries at Vienna’s iconic City Hall and continues to grow as a powerful platform for cross-sector collaboration. Each year, the event unites investors, entrepreneurs, civil society, policymakers, and thought leaders to address pressing societal challenges and find collaborative solutions. Through the collective efforts of the impact ecosystem, Impact Days has influenced policies, inspired investments, and empowered ideas and communities to thrive. title: Fundraising Secrets - The Complete Masterplan for Winning Investors and Building Lasting Relationships
location: Near Vienna Central Station (Hauptbahnhof) / Südtiroler Platz (exact address will be shared after booking)
descriptionFull:
Stop chasing buzzwords and start building real investor connections. I’ve been in your shoes—navigating the high-stakes world of VCs and Angels to secure 3 funding rounds across Austria, Germany, and the USA. Fundraising Secrets isn’t a theoretical lecture; it’s a deep dive into the reality of startup investment, based on my personal, battle-tested roadmap.

I’m Florian Kandler, and in this interactive workshop, we’re going “Beyond the Hype” to strip away the glossy myths. I’ll show you how to determine if an investor is actually the right match and how to engage in eye-level conversations built on credibility, not jargon. Whether you are a local founder or joining us from abroad, you’ll gain a universal blueprint to navigate your journey with confidence.

Don’t just hope for a check — learn how to foster lasting partnerships. You’ll leave with actionable techniques you can apply immediately at ViennaUP to turn your vision into a funded reality. Let’s get to work.

Stop chasing buzzwords and start building real investor connections. I’ve been in your shoes—navigating the high-stakes world of VCs and Angels to secure 3 funding rounds across Austria, Germany, and the USA. Don’t just hope for a check — learn how to foster lasting partnerships. You’ll leave with actionable techniques you can apply immediately at ViennaUP to turn your vision into a funded reality. Let’s get to work. Keep in mind: Last year, this workshop was sold out. So reserve your ticket early. Agenda The workshop is split into two parts : Input: I'll share with you the Fundraising Secrets that helped me and 100+ of my mentees to raise money (details, see below) Live Q&A: I'll answer questions of you and other participants about your specific fundraising scenario In this hands-on workshop, you will learn: The #1 reason why founders fail to get investors Hands-on practical strategies that you can implement right away Strategic input that will help you design your entire fundraising campaign How investors tick, what they expect from you, and how you can use this to your benefit The hidden psychology that drives >50% of the decision to invest, and how you can control it Understanding who's the right investor for you The right timing for opening and closing your funding round Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 18.05.2026 10:00 - 13:00 Near Wien Hauptbahnhof / Südtiroler Platz (exact address will be shared after booking) Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Der perfekte Pitch - vom Pitch Doktor, Dr. Florian Kandler - Lerne, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Startup, Projekt oder Business entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst. Der Perfekte Pitch - mit "Pitch Doktor" Dr. Florian Kandler Der Perfekte Pitch Start Über Über Florian Beratungsfokus Unterstützer WhatsApp Kanal Produkte Fundraising Winter Camp 2026 Arbeite 1:1 mit mir Workshop-Anfrage Im TV / 2m2m Bücher Business Devils Pitch Tips Startup Report Podcast Kundenerfolge Unternehmer:innen Akzeleratoren Start Über Über Florian Beratungsfokus Unterstützer WhatsApp Kanal Produkte Fundraising Winter Camp 2026 Arbeite 1:1 mit mir Workshop-Anfrage Im TV / 2m2m Bücher Business Devils Pitch Tips Startup Report Podcast Kundenerfolge Unternehmer:innen Akzeleratoren Newsletter » DER PERFEKTE PITCH Überzeuge Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner von deinen Ideen und Produkten „Ich zeige dir, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Projekt, Produkt, Business oder Startup entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst.“ — Dr. Florian Kandler (auch der „Pitch Doktor“ genannt) Fundraising Tipps erhalten » Pitch Tipps erhalten » Der Pitch Doktor ist offizieller Pitch Coach von: Der Pitch Doktor ist offizieller Pitch Coach von: Zugang zu meinem Newsletter sichern » Beratungs-Fokus Meine Beratung ist sehr stark fokussiert. Ich teile spezifisches Wissen, mit dem meine Klienten erfolgreich Kunden, Geschäftspartner und Investoren begeistern. Ich teile mein Wissen aus 20 Jahren Vertrieb und 15 Jahren als Unternehmer. Wissen aus meinen eigenen 3 Startups, die in Summe über 3 Millionen Euro von Investoren aus den USA, Deutschland und Österreich gewinnen konnten. Und Wissen aus meinen hunderten Coachings als offizieller Pitch-Coach von der Startup TV-Show „2 Minuten 2 Millionen“ und als Fundraising-Workshopleiter bei diversen Startup-Akzeleratoren und Corporat Innovation Porgrammen. Fundraising Bei der Investorensuche helfe ich Gründer:innen dabei, mit dem optimalen Aufwand an die besten Investoren heranzukommen. Gemeinsam optimieren wir die Chancen um Termine, Folgetermine und Investitionszusagen zu erhalten. Dazu gehört neben dem perfekten Pitch auch das Wissen um den 4-stufigen Fundraising-Prozess: von der Vorbereitung, Beziehungsaufbau, zum Outreach und Closing. Außerdem konkrete Strategien dazu, wie man Empfehlungen nutzt, wie man mit Investoren auf Augenhöhe ins Gespärch kommt und strategisch agiert, um Investoren aus der Wartehaltung zu holen und zu einer Investitionsenscheidung zu bewegen. Jetzt Fundraising Tipps erhalten » Mein "Business Angels Devils" Buch In diesem Buch verrate ich die versteckte Psychologie und Gedankenwelt von Business Angels. Du erfährst, was Business Angels wirklich wollen und wie du mit ihnen auf Augenhöhe verhandeln kannst. Dieses Buch habe ich auf Deutsch ganz persönlich, mit 0% KI und mit einigen lebhaften Anekdoten geschrieben und enthält viele meiner persönlichen Erlebnisse und Erfolgs-Strategien, die ich zur Investorensuche für meine eigenen Startups angewendet habe. Zum Business Devils Buch » Pitching Im Pitching helfe ich Menschen, ihre Idee, ihr Unternehmen oder ihr Angebot in kürzester Zeit so zu präsentieren, dass sie bei den Zuhörenden Neugier und echtes Interesse wecken. Das ist das Eintrittsticket in jede geschäftliche Beziehung oder Investition. Ein überzeugender Pitch entsteht, wenn Unterlagen und Präsentation perfekt aufeinander abgestimmt sind. Zudem sollte jeder Pitch an das jeweilige Format angepasst werden – ob auf der Bühne, online, im persönlichen Gespräch oder vor einer Gruppe. Selbst wenn der Pitch zunächst per E-Mail verschickt wird, etwa mit dem Ziel, überhaupt ein Gespräch zu vereinbaren, muss er präzise und ansprechend formuliert sein. Jetzt Pitch Tipps erhalten » Mein "Pitch Tips" Buch In diesem Buch verrate ich 33 meiner beliebtesten Tipps zur Optimierung deines Pitches. In jedem der dreiunddreißig Kapitel zeige ich dir die Methodik, die Psychologie und die konkrete Anwendung eines „Werkzeugs“, das du direkt auf deinen eigenen Pitch anwenden kannst, um ihn gezielt zu verbessern. Das Buch ist von mir auf Englisch und mit 0% KI verfasst und enthält zahlreiche Kniffe, die ich selbst regelmäßig nutze – sowohl für meine eigenen Pitches als auch in der Arbeit mit meinen Klientinnen und Klienten. Zum Pitch Tips Buch » Über mich Ich bin Florian, ich habe zwischen 2007 und 2015 drei Startups gegründet in denen ich immer für Fundraising, Marketing und Vertrieb zustädig war. Zwei meiner Startups erhielten in Summe über 3.000.000 Euro von VCs und Business Angels aus den USA, Deutschland und Österreich . Ich war 6 Monate lang im Silicon Valley auf Investorensuche, habe dutzende Investoren in London, Berlin, München und Wien getroffen. Und unter anderem auch den deutschen eCommerce-Milliardär Oliver Samwer (Gründer: Rocket Internet, Zalando, etc.) als Investor gewinnen können. Seit 2016 unterstütze ich Gründer:innen bei der Investorensuche. Ich unterrichte außerdem an zahlreichen Startup Inkubatoren und Akzeleratoren . Bei diversen Konferenzen halte ich Vorträge, Workshops oder bereite Gründer:innen auf ihren Pitchauftritt vor. Und habe Erfahrung aus sechs Jahren als der offizielle Startup Coach der „österreichischen Höhle der Löwen“, der TV-Startup Show „ 2 Minuten 2 Millionen “ auf österreichs größtem Privat-TV Sender Puls4. Eine eigene Hauptabendsendung mit mir wurde ebenfalls auf Puls4 ausgstrahlt. Mein Wissen habe ich auch in 2 Bücher zum Thema Fundraising und Pitching gepackt. In über 200 Podcast-Episoden habe ich Gründer, Investoren und Innovatoren interviewt. Und jährlich veröffentliche ich seit 2015 Jahren den Startup Report , ein Bericht von und mit Gründer:innen, die im letzten Jahr Investoren gewinnen konnten. Es macht mir einfach riesigen Spaß, Unternehmer:innen mit meinem Wissen und meinen Kontakten auf ihrem Weg zum Erfolg zu unterstützen. Ich freue mich, wenn auch wir uns bald persönlich kennenlernen. WO Man Mich Findet Auf der Bühne Bei Konferenzen wie 4Gamechangers, WU Entrepreneuship Avenue, Business Angel Summit, Podim In Workshops In meinen eigenen Workshops und Vorträgen oder bei Startup Akzeleratoren Im Coaching In kleinen Gruppen, mit Founder Teams und auf exklusiven Founder Retreats Im TV und Stream Bei 2 Minuten 2 Millionen, bei Puls 4 im Frühstücks TV, im Live Stream Referenzen von Unternehmer*Innen Das sagen Coaching-Klienten über unsere Zusammenarbeit 5 mal Danke zu: 1. DANKE für deine absolute Klarheit . Du schaffst es, das Chaos im Kopf zu ordnen. 2. DANKE für deine Geheimtipps, wie man einen Pitch emotional abrundet. 3. DANKE, dass du dir egal wann und egal wo IMMER Zeit genommen hast und du einem gleichzeitig das Gefühl gibst nie zu stören mit egal welcher Frage. 4. DANKE für die mega Formulierungen und grenzgeniale Wortspiele - seitdem habe ich keine Angst mehr und weiß, wie man professionell auf kritische Fragen antwortet! 5. DANKE, dass du sogar im Nachgang noch Support lieferst. Ein Pitch Doktor mit sehr viel Weitblick, Verstand und mit dem Herz am rechten Fleck! Gloria Hiltmair Gründerin, Seitenbunt Die Tipps von Florian haben mir wahnsinnig geholfen und haben meinem Pitch den letzten Feinschliff gegeben. Es ist immer großartig von einem Firmenfremden ein Feedback zu bekommen, da die Firmenblindheit doch immer stärker wird und man so auf Sachen aufmerksam wird, die man nie gesehen hätte. Sehr kompetent, sehr freundlich und super schnell im Feedback. Ich kann Florian jedem nur empfehlen! Andreas Höllmüller Geschäftsführer, Tastery Philipp Lederle Gründer, helpsole Florians Feedback auf unseren Helpsole Pitch war unglaublich wertvoll. Wir konnten uns um einiges verbessern! Vielen Dank für deine Zeit und deinen Support! Aydin Umutlu Gründer, Ali Cola Was soll man da sagen...einfach nur toll. Sachlich auf den Punkt. Motivierend Fehler angesprochen. Nachvollziehbare Verbesserungsvorschläge. Und das in Rekordzeit. Danke, Florian. Martin Granig Gründer, Monkee Vielen Dank für deinen super Input. Nicht nur zum Pitch, sondern auch zu anderen taktischeren und strategischeren Fragestellungen. Super wertvoller und on-the-point Input. Jakob Feinböck Gründer, wannarent Ich war schon bei 2 "Pitchtrainern", bevor ich Flor

title: Energy Launchpad: Shaping Europe's Energy Future
location: TU Wien (Technology University Vienna) near Karlsplatz (exact address will be shared after booking)
descriptionFull:
From Lab to Market: Scaling Europe’s Energy Future

Join the Energy Launchpad for an engaging discussion about transforming energy research into scalable European startups. Panelists from leading universities and corporations in the DACH region will explore how Europe can accelerate innovation, support startups, and develop a robust European energy ecosystem. Find out what makes the Energy Launchpad unique, learn about the challenges of bringing research to market, and discover how Europe can become a global leader in energy innovation. This event offers valuable insights for startups, investors, corporations, talent, and ecosystem players.

13:00:00 35526 4,5,8,9 false 0 10:00:00 1,2,4,5,6 1772097997 294 ViennaUP | Energy Launchpad: Shaping Europe's Energy Future Programme Log in Energy Launchpad: Shaping Europe's Energy Future To book a ticket please kindly register or log in here . Tickets Energy Launchpad: Shaping Europe's Energy Future Join leading experts at the Energy Launchpad to explore how energy innovation moves from lab to market FREE TICKET Description From Lab to Market: Scaling Europe’s Energy Future Join the Energy Launchpad at ViennaUP! How can Europe transform energy research into scalable startups and spin-offs that strengthen the resilience of critical infrastructure? Climate change and cyber threats put growing pressure on critical infrastructure such as energy systems, and secure, market-ready solutions are required. The Energy Launchpad brings together startups, researchers, corporates, and investors to close critical commercialization gaps in the energy sector. Explore Europe’s biggest opportunities in the energy market - from securing hydropower infrastructure in Alpine regions to bridging the gap between university spin-offs and ventures. Find out how start-ups drive resilience of energy systems through AI, quantum computing, and innovative business models, and discover the impact of research on solving real-world problems. Our experts from leading DACH universities and corporations will share their insights on innovation and how to accelerate it. They will also discuss how to overcome regulatory and financing barriers, and how to build a robust European energy ecosystem. On top, you will gain valuable insights into the requirements for building resilient energy businesses. Join us to connect with key ecosystem players and help shape Europe’s energy future. Agenda 10:00 - 10:30 | Welcome & Networking: Get to know the Energy Launchpad Community 10:30 - 11:00 | Lightning Talks: Introduction to the Energy Launchpad - From resea rch to Scalable Impact Key achievements, concrete activities, and real examples of how ELP supports energy innovations on their path to market. 11:00 - 11:45 | Panel Discussion (Fishbowl Format) With a focus on commercialization barriers, startup acceleration, industry collaboration, and the long-term impact of the Energy Launchpad on Europe's ecosystem 11:45 - 13:00 | Lunch & Networking (Open-World-Café) Facilitated tables and topic stations using the Open-World-Café method and hosted by ELP contributors, enable participants to engage in dynamic discussions with energy sector experts and ecosystem partners. Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 18.05.2026 10:00 - 13:00 TU Wien -Arnold-Schmidt-Saal, Gußhausstraße 27-29, 1040 Wien Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Home | Energy Launchpad Energy Launchpad top of page Energy Launchpad Summer School About Us Menu Close Stay in Touch Energy Launchpad Shaping Europe's Energy Future The Energy Launchpad is a European innovation programme designed to turn cutting-edge energy research into venture-scale energy businesses. The Energy Launchpad has a clear mission: to promote European technologies and start-ups in a way that strengthens economic sovereignty and competitiveness. Spin-offs and start-ups receive support in entering the market and scaling up their ideas. At the same time, joint innovation projects are initiated that bring science and industry closer together. Another key component of the Energy Launchpad is the exchange of best practices with the aim of building a strong, Europe-wide ecosystem for energy innovation. Our initiatives in 2026 Summer School Participate in a three-day workshop for students with start-up and spin-off ideas Energy Launchpad Award Win of the Energy Launchpad Awards for innovative energy start-ups from the DACH region Venture Clienting Challenges Industry use cases on AI & Quantum Computing and Resilience Ecosystem Side Events Meet us at numerous start-up and energy events and conferences throughout Europe Energy Launchpad Innovation Day Join us in Zurich during the Energy Week @ ETH, where bold energy ideas meet entrepreneurial talent. The Partners The Energy Launchpad unites leading universities, start-up ecosystems, and energy companies from across the DACH region. Each country is represented by one top university and one leading company: the Swiss Federal Institute of Technology Zurich (ETH Zurich) and Energie 360° from Switzerland, the Vienna University of Technology (TU Wien) and VERBUND AG from Austria, and the Technical University of Munich (TUM) , UnternehmerTUM GmbH and Energie Baden-Württemberg AG (EnBW) from Germany. ​ The founding institutions jointly launched the Energy Launchpad in October 2025, marking the beginning of a cross-border initiative to accelerate energy innovation. The Energy Launchpad is designed as a growing network. Additional partners from science, industry, and the broader European innovation ecosystem are invited to join forces, collaborate, and help drive forward the energy transition. title: Mobility in Action
location: ÖBB Open Innovation Factory, Lassallestrasse 5, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull: Mobility in Action is a hands-on pitching format by Community creates Mobility where startups present their solution and a current critical ask - from expert feedback and pilot partners to investment. A diverse audience of operators, public sector, investors, researchers and civil society supports with practical input and the right connections. Hosted at the ÖBB Open Innovation Factory, the 2026 Infrastructure Edition focuses on stations, hubs/interchanges, public space, wayfinding, to safety and accessibility.

title: Startup World Cup Austria 2026
companyName: invest.austria - Austrian association for private capital
descriptionFull:
The Startup World Cup, hosted by Pegasus Tech Ventures, is the largest startup competition worldwide, with more than 70 countries taking part every year. In 2021, the Austrian Angel Investors Association (now: invest.austria) and Austrian Startups brought the competition to Austria for the first time.

After a series of regional pre events across Austria, the winning startups compete on the final stage in Vienna, pitching for the chance to represent Austria at the global Startup World Cup Finals in Silicon Valley.

The finale programme features a fireside chat with international ecosystem leaders, followed by the final pitch competition, where selected startups present their vision in front of a high level jury of industry experts and investors. Each pitch is evaluated based on idea, market relevance, traction, competitive advantage, team and overall pitch performance.

The winning startup of the Austrian finals earns the opportunity to pitch at the Startup World Cup Grand Finale in San Francisco, with the chance to secure up to USD 1 million in investment from Pegasus Tech Ventures, along with global exposure, investor access and partner prizes.

title: The Perfect Pitch: How to Create Interest in You and Your Big Idea
location: Near Vienna Central Station (Hauptbahnhof) / Südtiroler Platz (exact location will be shared after booking)
descriptionFull:
Forget the flashy slides and over-rehearsed buzzwords. After years of pitching from Silicon Valley to Vienna to win over investors and partners, I’ve learned one thing: a "perfect pitch" isn’t a performance—it’s about creating genuine interest in a heartbeat.

I’m Florian Kandler, and in this interactive workshop, I’m giving you the battle-tested blueprint I’ve used to secure funding and build businesses. We’re going “Beyond the Hype” to focus on what actually works: clarity, authenticity, and substance. Whether you’re a founder, a creative, or a tech pioneer, you’ll learn how to articulate your value without the fluff.

Following a high-impact session at ViennaUP 2025, I’m back to help you master the art of the conversation starter. You’ll leave with a practical template to turn your big idea into a magnet for opportunities. Don’t just attend ViennaUP 2026 — be the person everyone wants to talk to. Let’s build a pitch that sticks.

Forget the flashy slides and over-rehearsed buzzwords. After years of pitching from Silicon Valley to Vienna to win over investors and partners, I’ve learned one thing: a "perfect pitch" isn’t a performance—it’s about creating genuine interest in a heartbeat. I’m Florian Kandler, and in this interactive workshop, I’m giving you the battle-tested blueprint I’ve used to secure funding and build businesses. Whether you’re a founder, a creative, or a tech pioneer, you’ll learn how to articulate your value without the fluff. Following a high-impact session at ViennaUP 2025, I’m back to help you master the art of the conversation starter. You’ll leave with a practical template to turn your big idea into a magnet for opportunities. Don’t just attend ViennaUP 2026 — be the person everyone wants to talk to. Let’s build a pitch that sticks. Keep in mind: Last year, this workshop was sold out. So reserve your ticket early. Agenda The workshop is split into two parts : Input : I'll share some of the most powerful pitch strategies and practical methods you can use immediately (details, see below) Live Pitches & Feedback : I'll give a few participants the chance to present a 3-minute pitch, and the analyze and optimize this pitch live on stage for everyone to learn from In this hands-on workshop, you will learn: The most common problems and mistakes in pitches, and how to fix them The strategic masterplan to craft a convincing pitch Smart goal-setting of your pitch The 3 key triggers you must achieve with your pitch The audience's mental journey you need to guide them on What to focus on in a short pitch Use of AI to craft a pitch 4 powerful "Pitch Boosters" to boost your pitch's impact Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 18.05.2026 14:00 - 17:00 Near Hauptbahnhof / Südtiroler Platz (exact location will be shared after booking) Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Der perfekte Pitch - vom Pitch Doktor, Dr. Florian Kandler - Lerne, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Startup, Projekt oder Business entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst. Der Perfekte Pitch - mit "Pitch Doktor" Dr. Florian Kandler Der Perfekte Pitch Start Über Über Florian Beratungsfokus Unterstützer WhatsApp Kanal Produkte Fundraising Winter Camp 2026 Arbeite 1:1 mit mir Workshop-Anfrage Im TV / 2m2m Bücher Business Devils Pitch Tips Startup Report Podcast Kundenerfolge Unternehmer:innen Akzeleratoren Start Über Über Florian Beratungsfokus Unterstützer WhatsApp Kanal Produkte Fundraising Winter Camp 2026 Arbeite 1:1 mit mir Workshop-Anfrage Im TV / 2m2m Bücher Business Devils Pitch Tips Startup Report Podcast Kundenerfolge Unternehmer:innen Akzeleratoren Newsletter » DER PERFEKTE PITCH Überzeuge Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner von deinen Ideen und Produkten „Ich zeige dir, wie du den perfekten Pitch für dein Projekt, Produkt, Business oder Startup entwickelst, mit dem du Investoren, Kunden und Geschäftspartner begeisterst.“ — Dr. Florian Kandler (auch der „Pitch Doktor“ genannt) Fundraising Tipps erhalten » Pitch Tipps erhalten » Der Pitch Doktor ist offizieller Pitch Coach von: Der Pitch Doktor ist offizieller Pitch Coach von: Zugang zu meinem Newsletter sichern » Beratungs-Fokus Meine Beratung ist sehr stark fokussiert. Ich teile spezifisches Wissen, mit dem meine Klienten erfolgreich Kunden, Geschäftspartner und Investoren begeistern. Ich teile mein Wissen aus 20 Jahren Vertrieb und 15 Jahren als Unternehmer. Wissen aus meinen eigenen 3 Startups, die in Summe über 3 Millionen Euro von Investoren aus den USA, Deutschland und Österreich gewinnen konnten. Und Wissen aus meinen hunderten Coachings als offizieller Pitch-Coach von der Startup TV-Show „2 Minuten 2 Millionen“ und als Fundraising-Workshopleiter bei diversen Startup-Akzeleratoren und Corporat Innovation Porgrammen. Fundraising Bei der Investorensuche helfe ich Gründer:innen dabei, mit dem optimalen Aufwand an die besten Investoren heranzukommen. Gemeinsam optimieren wir die Chancen um Termine, Folgetermine und Investitionszusagen zu erhalten. Dazu gehört neben dem perfekten Pitch auch das Wissen um den 4-stufigen Fundraising-Prozess: von der Vorbereitung, Beziehungsaufbau, zum Outreach und Closing. Außerdem konkrete Strategien dazu, wie man Empfehlungen nutzt, wie man mit Investoren auf Augenhöhe ins Gespärch kommt und strategisch agiert, um Investoren aus der Wartehaltung zu holen und zu einer Investitionsenscheidung zu bewegen. Jetzt Fundraising Tipps erhalten » Mein "Business Angels Devils" Buch In diesem Buch verrate ich die versteckte Psychologie und Gedankenwelt von Business Angels. Du erfährst, was Business Angels wirklich wollen und wie du mit ihnen auf Augenhöhe verhandeln kannst. Dieses Buch habe ich auf Deutsch ganz persönlich, mit 0% KI und mit einigen lebhaften Anekdoten geschrieben und enthält viele meiner persönlichen Erlebnisse und Erfolgs-Strategien, die ich zur Investorensuche für meine eigenen Startups angewendet habe. Zum Business Devils Buch » Pitching Im Pitching helfe ich Menschen, ihre Idee, ihr Unternehmen oder ihr Angebot in kürzester Zeit so zu präsentieren, dass sie bei den Zuhörenden Neugier und echtes Interesse wecken. Das ist das Eintrittsticket in jede geschäftliche Beziehung oder Investition. Ein überzeugender Pitch entsteht, wenn Unterlagen und Präsentation perfekt aufeinander abgestimmt sind. Zudem sollte jeder Pitch an das jeweilige Format angepasst werden – ob auf der Bühne, online, im persönlichen Gespräch oder vor einer Gruppe. Selbst wenn der Pitch zunächst per E-Mail verschickt wird, etwa mit dem Ziel, überhaupt ein Gespräch zu vereinbaren, muss er präzise und ansprechend formuliert sein. Jetzt Pitch Tipps erhalten » Mein "Pitch Tips" Buch In diesem Buch verrate ich 33 meiner beliebtesten Tipps zur Optimierung deines Pitches. In jedem der dreiunddreißig Kapitel zeige ich dir die Methodik, die Psychologie und die konkrete Anwendung eines „Werkzeugs“, das du direkt auf deinen eigenen Pitch anwenden kannst, um ihn gezielt zu verbessern. Das Buch ist von mir auf Englisch und mit 0% KI verfasst und enthält zahlreiche Kniffe, die ich selbst regelmäßig nutze – sowohl für meine eigenen Pitches als auch in der Arbeit mit meinen Klientinnen und Klienten. Zum Pitch Tips Buch » Über mich Ich bin Florian, ich habe zwischen 2007 und 2015 drei Startups gegründet in denen ich immer für Fundraising, Marketing und Vertrieb zustädig war. Zwei meiner Startups erhielten in Summe über 3.000.000 Euro von VCs und Business Angels aus den USA, Deutschland und Österreich . Ich war 6 Monate lang im Silicon Valley auf Investorensuche, habe dutzende Investoren in London, Berlin, München und Wien getroffen. Und unter anderem auch den deutschen eCommerce-Milliardär Oliver Samwer (Gründer: Rocket Internet, Zalando, etc.) als Investor gewinnen können. Seit 2016 unterstütze ich Gründer:innen bei der Investorensuche. Ich unterrichte außerdem an zahlreichen Startup Inkubatoren und Akzeleratoren . Bei diversen Konferenzen halte ich Vorträge, Workshops oder bereite Gründer:innen auf ihren Pitchauftritt vor. Und habe Erfahrung aus sechs Jahren als der offizielle Startup Coach der „österreichischen Höhle der Löwen“, der TV-Startup Show „ 2 Minuten 2 Millionen “ auf österreichs größtem Privat-TV Sender Puls4. Eine eigene Hauptabendsendung mit mir wurde ebenfalls auf Puls4 ausgstrahlt. Mein Wissen habe ich auch in 2 Bücher zum Thema Fundraising und Pitching gepackt. In über 200 Podcast-Episoden habe ich Gründer, Investoren und Innovatoren interviewt. Und jährlich veröffentliche ich seit 2015 Jahren den Startup Report , ein Bericht von und mit Gründer:innen, die im letzten Jahr Investoren gewinnen konnten. Es macht mir einfach riesigen Spaß, Unternehmer:innen mit meinem Wissen und meinen Kontakten auf ihrem Weg zum Erfolg zu unterstützen. Ich freue mich, wenn auch wir uns bald persönlich kennenlernen. WO Man Mich Findet Auf der Bühne Bei Konferenzen wie 4Gamechangers, WU Entrepreneuship Avenue, Business Angel Summit, Podim In Workshops In meinen eigenen Workshops und Vorträgen oder bei Startup Akzeleratoren Im Coaching In kleinen Gruppen, mit Founder Teams und auf exklusiven Founder Retreats Im TV und Stream Bei 2 Minuten 2 Millionen, bei Puls 4 im Frühstücks TV, im Live Stream Referenzen von Unternehmer*Innen Das sagen Coaching-Klienten über unsere Zusammenarbeit 5 mal Danke zu: 1. DANKE für deine absolute Klarheit . Du schaffst es, das Chaos im Kopf zu ordnen. 2. DANKE für deine Geheimtipps, wie man einen Pitch emotional abrundet. 3. DANKE, dass du dir egal wann und egal wo IMMER Zeit genommen hast und du einem gleichzeitig das Gefühl gibst nie zu stören mit egal welcher Frage. 4. DANKE für die mega Formulierungen und grenzgeniale Wortspiele - seitdem habe ich keine Angst mehr und weiß, wie man professionell auf kritische Fragen antwortet! 5. DANKE, dass du sogar im Nachgang noch Support lieferst. Ein Pitch Doktor mit sehr viel Weitblick, Verstand und mit dem Herz am rechten Fleck! Gloria Hiltmair Gründerin, Seitenbunt Die Tipps von Florian haben mir wahnsinnig geholfen und haben meinem Pitch den letzten Feinschliff gegeben. Es ist immer großartig von einem Firmenfremden ein Feedback zu bekommen, da die Firmenblindheit doch immer stärker wird und man so auf Sachen aufmerksam wird, die man nie gesehen hätte. Sehr kompetent, sehr freundlich und super schnell im Feedback. Ich kann Florian jedem nur empfehlen! Andreas Höllmüller Geschäftsführer, Tastery Philipp Lederle Gründer, helpsole Florians Feedback auf unseren Helpsole Pitch war unglaublich wertvoll. Wir konnten uns um einiges verbessern! Vielen Dank für deine Zeit und deinen Support! Aydin Umutlu Gründer, Ali Cola Was soll man da sagen...einfach nur toll. Sachlich auf den Punkt. Motivierend Fehler angesprochen. Nachvollziehbare Verbesserungsvorschläge. Und das in Rekordzeit. Danke, Florian. Martin Granig Gründer, Monkee Vielen Dank für deinen super Input. Nicht nur zum Pitch, sondern auch zu anderen taktischeren und strategischeren Fragestellungen. Super wertvoller und on-the-point Input. Jakob Feinböck Gründer, wannarent Ich war schon bei 2 "Pitchtrainern", bevor ich Flor

title: ViennaUP 2026 Opening Night
location: The Vienna City Hall, Friedrich-Schmidt-Platz 1, 1010, Vienna
descriptionFull:
ViennaUP 2026 returns in style: get ready to kick off a week of bold ideas in one of the city's most magical locations.

For this year's Opening Night, the Vienna Business Agency brings together founders, investors, and ecosystem representatives from around the world in none other than the Vienna City Hall, a place that best captures what the festival is all about: big ambition rooted in a history of innovation.

Beneath the light of the chandeliers, in a place that has shaped European culture, we will start forward-thinking conversations that will carry throughout the entire week as we make connections, build networks, and grow our businesses. The event is hosted by the Vienna Business Agency, which initiates and curates ViennaUP, our decentralised, community-driven festival brought to life year after year in partnership with local and international ecosystem players. 

The evening combines inspiration, substance, and a touch of surprise, including a special keynote by Fredrik Debong, serial entrepreneur and founder of mySugr, a Viennese buffet, and much more.

Expect exciting encounters and fresh perspectives, all against a breathtaking backdrop. See you in Vienna!

title: ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026
descriptionFull:
Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026! In hand-picked, invitation-style round tables, selected startups meet experienced investors and industry experts for formal conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward.

Expect curated matchmaking by the Vienna Business Agency team after registration to ensure the right mix of people and topics—so every seat at the table matters. All of this happens in iconic Viennese coffee houses, where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged.

If you’re fundraising, scaling, or simply looking for the right network and strategic sparring partners, this is your moment. Apply now and secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026.

FREE TICKET Description Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026 : invitation-style round tables where selected startups meet experienced investors and innovation managers for formal conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward. After registering, you’ll be asked to apply for one of three table hosts (Investor / Innovation Manager). The Vienna Business Agency team will then curate the final line-up to ensure the right mix of startups and topics at each table. Capacity is limited: 3 startups per host per session, so every seat at the table matters. This format is designed for startups that are beyond the early idea stage—typically with validated traction (e.g., MVP in market, first revenues, growth signals, or a clear scaling/fundraising roadmap). If you’re fundraising, scaling, or looking for strategic sparring and the right network, this is your moment. Sessions take place May 18–22 in morning and afternoon time slots, hosted in iconic Viennese coffee houses—where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged. Apply now to secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026. When applying, please select your preferred host and briefly share your traction, goals, and what you want to discuss at the table. title: Connect Day 26
descriptionFull:
Connect Day 26 is the #1 platform for fostering connections among startups, corporates, SMEs, and investors. The event is designed to spark partnerships, promote innovation, and provide opportunities for pitching your ideas.

What to expect:

  • B2B Matchmaking 1:1: 15-minute targeted "speed dating" with startups, corporates, and investors to explore potential collaborations and validate your ideas. Taking place throughout the entire day.
  • 4 Topics each incl. startup pitches & expert panel:
    Dive into the topics through interactive panels, expert Q&A, and six startup pitches per session.
    • FrontierTech & AI
    • GreenTech & Manufacturing
    • MedTech & LifeScience
    • UrbanTech, Mobility & EnergyTransition
  • Expo Area: Startups and corporates present themselves to an innovation-driven audience.
  • Corporate Reverse Pitches: Corporates and SMEs pitch their collaboration opportunities directly to startups.

Join the dynamic innovation ecosystem of Austria and Europe in a focused, engaging, and impactful day of networking and knowledge-sharing. Apply now to secure your spot!

Access to Connect Day is only possible after being accepted/activated on www.connectday.at.

ADMISSION CRITERIA 4 TOPIC DEEP DIVES Interactive panel with experts & audience exchange followed by 6 Startup pitches & questions from an expert jury FrontierTech & AI GreenTech & Manufacturing MedTech & LifeScience UrbanTech, Mobility & EnergyTransition Application CONNECT DAY 26 - Teaser PROGRAM 2026 Connect Day is held as a green event in accordance with the minimum requirements of the Green Events quality label. B2B Matchmaking 1:1 The heart of Connect Day 26 will again be the 1:1 Matchmaking taking place throughout the day: Startups, Corporates/SMEs, Investors and Austria's & Europe's dynamic innovation ecosystems meet with each other - all in one location & one day. Please get your ticket in the external ticket shop Get your Ticket Description This year, Impact Days invites a different way of engaging with the future. Not by predicting it, simplifying it, or choosing sides, but by shaping it consciously, within the real limits that define our time. Holding Tensions, Creating Impact is the guiding idea for Impact Days ’26. As economic, ecological, technological, and social systems become increasingly intertwined, progress no longer comes from easy answers or single solutions. Impact Days ’26 is built around three core tensions shaping the impact economy today: Nature and Technology, Stability and Change, and Value Extraction and Regeneration. These are not problems to be solved, but relationships to be held, navigated, and designed with care. Impact Days ’26 is a space for learning how to work in this complexity. It is about making trade-offs visible, holding opposing forces in relationships, and shaping futures that can endure within social and planetary limits. The conference brings together entrepreneurs, investors, leaders, and system builders who are ready to engage with responsibility rather than certainty. Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 18.05.2026 09:00 - 19.05.2026 12:00 Rathaus Wien (City Hall Vienna), Friedrich-Schmidt-Platz 1, 1010 Wien Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Impact Days '26 Impact Days 0 Skip to Content HOME ABOUT AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS Open Menu Close Menu HOME ABOUT AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS Open Menu Close Menu HOME ABOUT AGENDA SPEAKERS STARTUPS Holding Tensions, Creating Impact. 18-19 May RATHAUS Vienna Value Extraction & Regeneration Value Extraction & Regeneration Value Extraction & Regeneration Stability & Change Stability & Change Stability & Change Nature & Technology Nature & Technology Nature & Technology Impact Days '26 Impact Days '26 Impact Days '26 Tensions Shaping the Impact Economy Nature and Technology Rather than treating nature, humans, and technology as separate domains, Impact Days ‘26 brings them into a single system. Nature sets the boundaries within which economies must operate. Humans bring values, judgment, care, and responsibility. Artificialsystems extend our capacity to sense, analyse, and act at scale. This tension is about integration rather than opposition. It asks how technologies, including artificial intelligence, can be designed to strengthen human agency and regenerate natural systems, rather than override, replace, or extract from them. Core question: How do we design technologies and systems that operate in service of human dignity and planetary health? Stability and Change Most economic and institutional systems are built on assumptions of stability, predictability, and control. The reality we face is one of accelerating change, complex feedback loops, and unintended consequences. Impact Days ‘26 explores how entrepreneurs, investors, and leaders can operate responsibly without the illusion of certainty. This includes rethinking metrics, governance models, and decision-making processes suited to complex adaptive systems; where not all outcomes can be forecast in advance. Core question: How do we lead, invest, and innovate when the most important outcomes cannot be fully predicted? Value Extraction and Regeneration Economic systems constantly move along a spectrum between value extraction and value regeneration. Extraction enables speed, efficiency, and concentration of returns, while regeneration sustains the social and ecological foundations on which long-term value creation depends. Anchored in the Donut Economy, this tension reframes success as operating within planetary boundaries while strengthening social foundations. Capital, enterprises, and innovation are examined not as ends in themselves, but as tools for long-term system health and resilience. Core question:What would it mean to design businesses and investments that leave systems better than they found them? Learn more Events Events that bring people together to exchange ideas, spark collaboration, and enable action. From interactive workshops to conferences that shape the future of impact. Learn more For 14 years, we have been bringing the impact ecosystem together at Austria’s largest impact event, Impact Days. In 2025, it brought together over 750 participants from 49 countries at Vienna’s iconic City Hall and continues to grow as a powerful platform for cross-sector collaboration. Each year, the event unites investors, entrepreneurs, civil society, policymakers, and thought leaders to address pressing societal challenges and find collaborative solutions. Through the collective efforts of the impact ecosystem, Impact Days has influenced policies, inspired investments, and empowered ideas and communities to thrive. title: The Female Founders Experience Vienna 2026
location: The Social Hub Vienna, Nordbahnstrasse 47, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull:
Fostering change through real connections.

​The world may feel like it’s going crazy. Instead of complaining, we created FFX – a space for trusted, authentic, and lasting connections.

​We bring together Europe’s leading founders, investors, and leaders to learn from each other, exchange openly, and build relationships that last a lifetime.
And yes, this is a women-only event.

​This time, we bundle strengths as we know it's the only path forward for radical change: FFX joins forces with ViennaUP to bring the Austrian and European ecosystems together.

Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy The Female Founders Experience - time for real connections Welcome to the Female Founders Experience (FFX), the most curated and authentic event for female founders, investors & leaders. The place where women connect on a deep level and build business connections that last for a lifetime. Female Founders About FFX FFX Vienna 2026 Next Locations Become a Partner Your Host: Female Founders, the biggest and fastest-growing community for women in tech in Europe. At Female Founders we connect community, capital, and cultural change to close critical gaps in Europe’s startup ecosystem. Through safe spaces, alliances, and bold ideas, we help founders, investors, and leaders build what others don’t dare to. We are courageous, trustworthy, and transformative. What is FFX FFX is not a conference. It’s a curated experience where women show up honestly, connect deeply, and collaborate intentionally. It’s a movement reshaping the European tech landscape and pushing it toward true equality. Together, we walk the talk. We address the topics that usually stay unspoken. We name the elephant in the room. And we do it one city at a time. Join FFX Vienna Fostering change through real connections. (period) Together, we are growing and connecting the female founders ecosystem - advancing equality in the startup world, championing funding fairness, and driving sustainable innovation. We bring Europe’s leading founders, investors, and leaders together to learn from one another and forge relationships that last a lifetime. And yes, this is a women-only event. FFX VIENNA 2026 19-20 May 2026 The Social Hub Vienna Apply here We focus on Quality over Quantity The Female Founders Experience (FFX) is a curated & an application-only event. It is designed to enable real, meaningful engagement among a selected group of founders, investors and leaders from the corporate & tech ecosystem. This guarantees focused networking and in-depth conversations. No bullshit, just business. You'll experience Joy over FOMO Remember those events where you're supposed to attend 5 sessions at the same time while growing your network? Not at FFX. We provide you with a personalized schedule for the entire event - and we guarantee that you won't miss out on any content or connection. We're a FOMO-free zone. Why you should join if you are a female founder Being a startup founder is exhilarating, but also overwhelming and lonely at times. At FFX, you’ll join an exclusive group of carefully selected female startup founders - from pre-seed to pre-exit stage. This is your space to share wins, struggles, and lessons learned - openly and without judgment. No judgement. Just support. Why you should join if you are a female investor Early-stage investing is all about people. At FFX, you’ll connect with other female investors - business angels, LPs, VC representatives as well as Institutional Investors - with at least two active startup-investments. Gain direct access to promising founders, expand your deal flow, and discover new opportunities for co-investment within a powerful circle of peers you can trust. Find co-investors. Find founders. Why you should join if you are a female leader Leading as a woman comes with unique challenges. At FFX, you’ll meet female leaders shaping the ecosystem - in politics, corporates, or other sectors driving change. Build meaningful peer connections, strengthen your influence, and accelerate your path to the next level of leadership. Grow your network. Speed up your career. unique & curated What participants say about FFX “This has been the best event! It’s truly touching that you’ve organized everything so thoughtfully for us. I really hope FFX will take place again next year!" "Bringing together all the women for a closer and more authentic networking opportunity was greatly appreciated. You have exceeded your goal by more than 100%. This kind of event is unique, and we are looking forward to the next FFX.” “I loved the experience - it was inspiring, empowering and made me reflect. I learned a lot and I want to continue to invest even more in supporting other women.” Preliminary Agenda for FFX Vienna 2026 Please note that the agenda is subject to change. Apply for FFX to unlock the full agenda in the attendee portal. Time 19.05 20.05 - Day 1: Day 2: Morning: Check-In & Coffee Hub Breakfast - FFX Kick-Off Mindful Body Day 2 - Opening Spotlight AI-Ready Reskilling for a New Era of Leadership - Innovation & Startup Perspective Personal Finance - Mindful Body with Verena Stefenelli Due Diligence for Founders - Let's Talk Money, Really Investor Hub Session - Women in Politics Leaders Hub Session Lunch: Networking Lunch Matchmaking Lunch - Mood Check-in Strategic Hormonal Health Afternoon: Hub Sessions: Elephant in the Room Session - Capital Efficient with AI How to run a smart fundraising process - Your First Direct Investment Leaders Hub Session - Mental Health & Burnout Prevention Investors Hub Session - The Biggest Communication Fails Leaders Make Coffee Break - Pricing for Founders Inspiration Spotlight - Women in Critical Infrastructure Who Makes Innovation Happen? Founders, Investors & Leaders in Conversation. - Open Mic FFX Vienna 2026 Closing - Spritzer & True Connections Spritzer & Stay Connected The women leading the conversations that matter These are the voices helping shape the experience in Vienna Proudly supported by This was FFX Barcelona 10th February 2026 I TSH Barcelona A decade shaping the future of female innovation We don’t follow trends, we set them This was FFX Zurich 2025 . 120+ exceptional women from across Europe in one room. A day built on honesty, ambition, and real collaboration. Circle Circle Sharing Circles A safe & supportive space where investors, founders, and leaders share their honest thoughts, experiences & ideas. Focused on a specific topic, guided by an expert. (entire audience) User User Round Tables Insights by selected experts on topics relevant for each group (founders or investors or leaders). Accompanied by in-depth discussions between the experts & the participants. (for each group) Message Message Reverse Pitching In a traditional pitch, startups present their ideas to investors. In Reverse Pitching, the roles are flipped: investors and corporate partners pitch their value beyond capital. (entire audience) Heart Heart Guided Networking Life is all about connections. You will join dedicated networking sessions with participants. Additionally, we will match you with your FFX buddies to boost your business & career. (entire audience) Become a part of fostering change through real connection. Reach out to us to become a Partner. Email Contact us “ Focusing on female leaders and founders was a highly needed and successful decision. The curated setting enabled more authentic networking than typical industry events. From a partner perspective, it made it possible to understand founders’ needs and growth goals much more closely, and we saw a strong appetite for learning and development. This kind of event is unique, and we’re looking forward to the next FFX.” Proudly supported by Female Founders Experience is brought to you by Female Founders, Europe's biggest community for women in the tech ecosystem. title: Salon Future: Connecting Startup Ecosystems
descriptionFull:
Join a unique platform designed for city representatives, startup ecosystem builders, and organizations committed to fostering thriving startup communities. Salon Future is your opportunity to connect, collaborate, and exchange insights with peers from cities around the globe.

This event is dedicated to sharing experiences, tackling challenges, and exploring innovative solutions to enhance startup ecosystems. Attendees can participate in dynamic panel discussions, interactive sessions, and engaging networking opportunities.

Key topics include:

  • Building and nurturing entrepreneurial communities.
  • Attracting international startups to your city.
  • Discussing forward-thinking policies to support startup growth.

Please, be aware that Salon Future is NOT an event for startups!

Are you responsible for startup-related initiatives in your city? Would you like to join us at Salon Future? Register now for our waiting list, and we’ll be in touch!

title: Human x AI Conference
descriptionFull:
Human×AI is a medium for ideas, vision, partnership, and collaboration, bringing together the brightest minds at the intersection of artificial intelligence and European ambition.

Human×AI Europe is a platform for the conversation that matters most: how we build Europe's next era.

It's where founders, investors, businesses, policymakers, and cities come together to shape a future that's prosperous, sovereign, and human—by design.

Europe's next chapter won't write itself. Strategic autonomy in technology, security, and the ecosystems where innovation takes root depends on choices being made now. This conference gathers the people who must work together—to forge partnerships, launch pilots, and commit to what comes next.

The continent that gave the world the Renaissance, the Industrial Revolution, and the foundations of modern science now confronts a new frontier—one that will determine its place in the global order for generations to come. The question is no longer whether AI will transform Europe, but how Europe will shape AI to reflect its values: human dignity, democratic governance, and sustainable prosperity. The Big Question Will Europe seize this generational momentum to build AI-powered ecosystems that are prosperous, sovereign, and human-centered? Our Mission Building an AI-powered, sovereign Europe Human×AI brings together leaders, builders, and thinkers at the intersection of artificial intelligence and European ambition. title: "Do it right" Basics for company founding in Vienna
location: Wirtschaftskammer Wien, Straße der Wiener Wirtschaft 1, 1020 Vienna, EG (ground floor), Saal 5
descriptionFull:
This workshop provides a practical guide for founders and startups, covering everything you need to know before, during, and after starting your business with a trade license. Topics include:

Before founding: choosing the right legal form, understanding types of trades (free vs. regulated), planning finances, and exploring funding opportunities (e.g., NeuFöG)

During founding: registering your trade license in Vienna, entering the commercial register, and setting up commercial social insurance

After founding: understanding taxes, managing ongoing compliance, and navigating social insurance (including part-time self-employment)

After the seminar, participants will have the opportunity to connect with experts in these areas to ask questions and get practical advice tailored to their business.

title: From Pitch to Patient: How Digital Health and AI actually make it into Practice
descriptionFull:
There are plenty of new HealthTech ideas – and some actually have the potential to change the healthcare system! At this meetup we will bring startups and professionals from hospitals, care facilities, and medical practices together and focus on real problems in healthcare, concrete solutions, and an honest look at what works in practice. Beyond individual improvements, we explore how technological innovation has the potential to fundamentally transform healthcare systems, making them more efficient, accessible, and patient-centered.

Through short keynotes, startup pitches, use cases and interactive discussions, we show how innovations can be designed to ease workflows, benefit patients, and integrate into existing structures.

Whether you're a founder, physician, nurse, manager, or IT professional – if you want to help ensure that innovation in healthcare doesn't get stuck in pitch decks but actually reaches patients and teams, driving systemic change in the process, you're in the right place.

What control do we have over the situation? Where can processes be improved? How can new approaches be established within organisations that are highly people-centred (ethical issues, the human/machine divide)? Practical experience from an organisational perspective Startup AI background International successes and real change examples – measurable proof of systemic change in healthcare Moderator: Nina Eibl, Health Hub Vienna 19:00 Networking 21:00 End Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 19.05.2026 17:00 - 21:00 Sky Lounge (12th Floor), Oskar‑Morgenstern‑Platz 1, 1090 Wien Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. title: ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026
descriptionFull:
Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026! In hand-picked, invitation-style round tables, selected startups meet experienced investors and industry experts for honest conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward.

Expect curated matchmaking by the Vienna Business Agency team after registration to ensure the right mix of people and topics—so every seat at the table matters. All of this happens in iconic Viennese coffee houses, where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged.

If you’re fundraising, scaling, or simply looking for the right network and strategic sparring partners, this is your moment. Apply now and secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026.

title: HOIV Founder Huddle 2026: Pitch, Build & Scale
location: HOIV - Home of Innovation, Arsenalstraße 11, 1030 Vienna
descriptionFull:
HOIV Founder Huddle 2026 is a focused, consultation-driven session designed for a curated group of startup teams who are actively building and looking for meaningful strategic input. As part of ViennaUP, the session enables a space where founders can openly discuss real challenges and receive practical, experience-driven feedback.

This is not a traditional demo day or pitch competition. Instead, it is a structured working session that blends elements of a workshop, meet-the-expert format, and moderated group discussion.

Selected startups will join experienced operators, investors, VCs, banks, and industry experts in a structured working format.
- It is an open setting designed for real conversation.
- The focus is on real topics that founders face every day — from market positioning and product direction to fundraising preparation, operational bottlenecks, team dynamics, and scaling decisions.

It feels like everyone’s working on something interesting, and you can always find someone to collaborate with. Mark H. Developer HOIV blends business, creativity, and community better than anywhere else I’ve seen. Laura M. Project Manager I’ve met curators, photographers, and even brands here. It’s a place where creative work actually meets business. Elena Visual Artist For me, it’s the ecosystem that makes the difference. You can cowork, collaborate on projects, attend an event, or just hang out and meet people who understand what you’re trying to build. It’s a rare mix of structure and openness. Lukas Startup Founder The team knows what they’re doing. You don’t need to explain much. They get it, help with setup, and the crowd that shows up is always curious and open-minded. It makes hosting events a lot easier. It’s a community that combines spaces, events, services, and funding to give people the right environment to create, collaborate, and grow. 2.Who is HOIV for? HOIV is open to anyone with ideas and ambition — from founders and artists to freelancers, educators, corporate teams, and investors. Whether you’re building a company, creating art, supporting innovation, or looking to collaborate, you’ll find your place here. 3. What can I do at HOIV? At HOIV, you can join talks, exhibitions, and networking sessions; connect with collaborators; access expert business services and funding opportunities; and work or create in our flexible spaces and studios. title: Lab to Leader: Building Science Ventures That Last
location: TU in the Sky,  Getreidemarkt  9,  1060 Vienna
descriptionFull:
Future-Proof Cofounder Teams & Scaling-Ready Startups
Transform research into ventures built to scale. This full-day track tackles the make-or-break challenges every science startup faces: finding the right cofounder and scaling successfully. 

What to Expect

  • Cofounder Matching Pitches – A joint initiative by AIT, BOKU, MedUni Wien, TU Wien, Uni Wien, WU Wien & Xista, connecting local and international academic spinoffs with business cofounders through pitches and dedicated networking zones.

  • Panel: "Cofounder and Scaling Stories – Wins, Woes & Needs," moderated by Petra Wolkenstein, Konsultori.

  • Keynote: "Aligning for Success – Building Future-Proof Cofounder Teams," with Michael Kubiena, Konsultori.

  • Session: "How to Build a Dream Team: Why Interdisciplinarity is Key", New Venture Scouting.

For: Science entrepreneurs, aspiring cofounders, spinoffs in formation, pre-scaleups, and accelerator/entrepreneurship program managers.

Organised by: Konsultori & Vienna Spin-Off Project (AIT, BOKU, Medizinische Universität Wien, TU Wien, Universität Wien, WU Wien, Xista)
Sponsored by AWS.
