Mit uns arbeiten Zusatz-Umsatz erwirtschaftet 1 m EUR Investoren-Kapital, Public Funding und Unternehmensverkäufe gesichert 0 m EUR Unternehmer:innen trainiert und gecoacht 1000 Der Erfolg von Unternehmern liegt uns am Herzen. Konsultori arbeitet mit engagierten Unternehmern zusammen, um ihre Unternehmen zu entwickeln. Wir sind leidenschaftliche Experten , mit umfassender Erfahrung aus erster Hand Wir beraten und trainieren Unternehmer und begleiten sie in der Umsetzung. Wir verwenden schnell anwendbare Konzepte und Werkzeuge. Wir haben bewiesen, dass unsere Methoden funktionieren. Wir glauben an Zusammenarbeit und fördern sie, wo wir können. Mehr erfahren Unsere Expertise für Ihr Unternehmen 01. Startups early / mid-stage Wenn Sie Ihr Produkt auf den Markt gebracht haben und über die Anfangsphase hinaus Unterstützung benötigen, unterstützen wir Sie bei Ihren nächsten Schritten. Mehr erfahren 02. Innovative KMUs Wenn Sie ein kleines oder mittleres Unternehmen sind, begleitet Konsultori Sie bei der Stärkung Ihrer Unternehmensziele, Finanzen, Organisation und Entwicklung. Mehr erfahren 03. Investoren Wenn Sie in Start-ups oder KMU investieren und Unterstützung bei der Bewertung ihres Potenzials, der Due-Diligence und der Zusammenarbeit mit ihnen nach Ihrer Investition benötigen, können wir Sie bei Ihrer Entscheidung und der Umsetzung Ihrer Transaktion und neuen Strategie unterstützen. Mehr erfahren 04. Akzeleratoren Wenn Sie einen Accelerator leiten und Experten aus dem Startup-Bereich benötigen, um Ihre Startups zu trainieren und zu coachen oder sogar ein ganzes Startup-Programm anzubieten, stehen wir Ihnen mit unseren Trainern und Live- und digitalen Formaten für Ihre Kohorte zur Seite. Mehr erfahren Ausgezeichnet von Unterstützung für Sie Wählen Sie ein Themengebiet, das am besten zu Ihnen passt, und lassen Sie uns über Ihre Herausforderungen sprechen. Unsere Experten werden Ihre Fragen beantworten und Sie über mögliche Lösungen und Unterstützung beraten. unverbindliches Erstgespräch buchen Wachstum und Strategie M&A - Unternehmensfinanzierung Organisationsdesign Workshops für Akzeleratoren Selbstlernkurse Unsere Partner leiten Ihre Projekte Petra Wolkenstein Gründerin von Konsultori petra.wolkenstein@konsultori.com Michael Kubiena Konsultori Partner michael.kubiena@konsultori.com Unsere Werte Wir sind Unternehmer aus Leidenschaft Unsere Leidenschaft für das Geschäft ist ansteckend. Wir sind selbst Unternehmer und Investoren und wollen unsere Erfahrungen und unser Wissen mit Kunden und Partnern teilen. Wir gehen den ganzen Weg Beratung und Konzepte sind nur der Anfang. Wir geben nicht so schnell auf, krempeln die Ärmel hoch und erzielen Ergebnisse. Innovative Lösungen Mit unseren innovativen Formaten in Beratung und Training finden wir immer die für unsere Kunden passenden, zukunftsweisenden Lösungen. Wir befähigen zu langfristigem Erfolg Wir befähigen Unternehmer, die Fähigkeiten aufzubauen, um ihre Herausforderungen zu meistern und langfristig erfolgreich zu sein. Wir erwarten von den Unternehmern und von uns selbst, dass wir Verantwortung für eine nachhaltige Zukunft übernehmen - für das Unternehmen und darüber hinaus. Wir glauben an die Kraft der Zusammenarbeit Unsere Kreativität und unser Einfallsreichtum liegen darin, Verbindungen zu schaffen (die andere vielleicht nicht sehen können, sei es konzeptionell oder in Form von Kooperationen), die es den Unternehmern ermöglichen, Herausforderungen zu meistern. Wir schätzen und erwarten Vielfalt Offenheit, Fairness und eine menschliche Note. Unser Team bringt unterschiedliche Perspektiven in unsere Arbeit ein. Wir bemühen uns um eine offene und gleichberechtigte Kommunikation und fördern Feedback und faires Verhalten. Alle anzeigen Die Zusammenarbeit mit Franziska war großartig; sie war uns in einigen wirklich schwierigen Zeiten eine wertvolle Ansprechpartnerin. Ihr Coaching hat uns geholfen, unsere Markteinführungsstrategie zu verfeinern und unseren Pitch während der Kapitalbeschaffung zu optimieren. Vielen Dank euch allen! Stephan Hofmann Minimist War ein richtig guter Tag – intensiv, klar, motivierend. Jetzt gehen wir den Weg gemeinsam weiter. Ein großes Danke an Petra Wolkenstein, die uns durch den Tag begleitet hat. Stefan Reichlin-Meldegg Gradient Solutions Heute habe ich meine Finanzberatung mit der unglaublichen Petra Wolkenstein begonnen. Petra verfügt über eine seltene Kombination aus unglaublich fundiertem Fachwissen, Geduld und Klarheit, die komplexe Finanzthemen zugänglich und sogar spannend macht. Sie hilft nicht nur bei den Zahlen, sondern auch dabei, das große Ganze Ihrer Mission zu sehen und wie Sie diese wirklich nachhaltig gestalten können. Ich bin fest davon überzeugt, dass sie derzeit die Beste in Wien ist! 🚀 Rita Laila Fussenegger AufAtmenWG Petra war von Anfang an ein wichtiger Teil von Howie. Was als vorübergehendes Executive Coaching begann, um mir bei der Bewältigung der Herausforderungen als Solopreneur zu helfen, hat sich in den letzten zwei Jahren, in denen wir das Unternehmen ausgebaut haben, zu einer vertrauensvollen, langfristigen Partnerschaft entwickelt. Ihre Klarheit, Strukturiertheit und Fähigkeit, Komplexität zu durchschauen, waren in Zeiten hohen Wachstums und hohen Drucks von unschätzbarem Wert. Darüber hinaus spielte Petra eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Gestaltung unserer Finanzstrategie und der Entwicklung eines soliden Finanzplans zur Unterstützung unserer VC-Finanzierungsrunde. Ich bin ihr für ihre beständige Unterstützung sehr dankbar und würde sie jedem Gründer, der sich auf dem komplexen Weg des Aufbaus eines Unternehmens befindet, wärmstens empfehlen. Ewa Lenart Howie Wir schätzen die Erkenntnisse und das Wissen, das uns die herausragenden Experten von Konsultori vermittelt haben. Ihre Ratschläge helfen uns, schneller und intelligenter zu wachsen. Besonderer Dank gilt Petra Wolkenstein, deren Unterstützung und Mentoring uns dazu inspirieren, größer zu denken und Herausforderungen mit Zuversicht anzugehen. Ihre Ratschläge haben bereits entscheidenden Einfluss darauf, wie wir unseren Wachstumskurs gestalten. Ronja Scherzinger FashionTouri Wir haben gewonnen! Gestern wurde MINTorin bei der Pitch-Session des European Forum Alpbach im Bereich Klima als eine von vier Gewinnerideen ausgewählt. Ich bin Franziska Kolk unglaublich dankbar, die mich über die Wirtschaftsagentur Wien gecoacht und mir geholfen hat, das Beste aus diesem Pitch herauszuholen. Das ist auch Ihr Sieg! Sonja Macher InnovationsMacherIN Aktuell bin ich gerade auf der Suche nach der idealen Strategie, um mein Unternehmen weiter wachsen und gedeihen zu lassen. Dabei hilft mit die finanzielle Übersicht, die ich mit Petra Wolkenstein von Konsultori gema

title: The Recursive CEE Forum
descriptionFull:
The Recursive CEE Forum returns to ViennaUP to connect the innovation leaders in the CEE region and strengthen its role in building Europe’s tech future. Last year, 450 founders, investors, ecosystem builders, and policymakers came together, turning cross-border conversations into real connections.

In 2026, we build on that pace with a sharper focus on outcomes: interactive formats, data-driven insights on the region’s innovation performance, and curated opportunities for founders and investors to connect with intent. The forum creates a stronger bridge between CEE and DACH, enabling collaboration across startups, capital, institutions, and technology leaders. Discussions will cover market expansion, capital efficiency, founder tenacity, strategic technologies, and the regulatory landscape shaping innovation across Europe.

Join The Recursive CEE Forum at ViennaUP 2026 and be part of the conversation driving the region forward, forging partnerships, enabling smarter decisions, and increasing international visibility.

title: WSA Global Congress
descriptionFull:
WSA Global Congress – Scaling Digital Solutions. For People & Planet.

Meet the people behind the world’s most impactful digital solutions at the WSA Global Congress in Vienna.

Connect with social entrepreneurs, innovators, policymakers, investors, and ecosystem builders working to scale digital solutions with social impact globally.

Interactive morning sessions let you exchange ideas and gain practical insights on ethical AI, digital sovereignty, and how to successfully scale tech solutions that address real societal and environmental challenges.

In the afternoon, experience the live pitches of the WSA Winners 2025, presenting digital impact solutions from around the world, offering inspiration, partnership opportunities, and real-world use cases for impact at scale.

Join this truly global, multi-stakeholder community and leave with new connections, optimistic perspectives, and concrete ideas to grow your own impact.

Don't forget to check out WSA Community Day, too!

Find out more about the event agenda, speakers and more on our website:

Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy WSA Global Congress in Vienna Scaling Digital Solutions: For People & Planet May 19-22 | Vienna, Austria The WSA Global Congress is coming home to its roots in Austria! Expect to make valuable connections, learn new perspectives, and to plug in to a community that believes tech can bring about positive change. Connecting all of that with the agenda 2030 […] About Awards Mission UN Context WSIS Context Board WSA Team Contact FAQs Participate WSA Award Benefits Timeline Rules Apply Young Innovators Benefits Timeline Rules Apply Partner Awards Winners WSA Winners WSA ix3 Winners’ Stories Winners’ Impact Network National Experts National Experts Expert’s Corner Youth Community Youth Ambassadors Youth Community Jurors Speakers Patrons Partners Strategic Partners Hosting Partners Sponsoring Partners Media Partners Events Global Congress Jury Events EYIF UniVation Innovation Events Partner Events Media News & Events Press Releases Clippings Publications Newsletter WSA Global Congress in Vienna Scaling Digital Solutions: For People & Planet May 19-22 | Vienna, Austria The WSA Global Congress is coming home to its roots in Austria! Expect to make valuable connections, learn new perspectives, and to plug in to a community that believes tech can bring about positive change. Connecting all of that with the agenda 2030 and an ongoing cooperation with the UN, the WSA Global Congress connects digital innovation directly to the achievement of the UN Global Goals , turning mindful ideas into measurable global impact. Get your tickets! Main Event Get your tickets for Day 1 and 2, which will be focused on networking, knowledge exchange, and the winner pitches. Day 1 and 2 Deep Dive Day Get your tickets for day 3, a smaller, more specialized final-day program offering participants hands-on workshops or thematic discussions tailored to democracy innovation or startup scaling challenges. Day 3 Topics Agenda Winners Key Participants Barbara Novak welcome statement Why Vienna Visas Partners Topics Digital Sovereignty vs. AI | Control, Choice, Community AI is shaping how we work, learn, and promises great solutions. But digital sovereignty is slipping: control sits far from the people affected, and systems built without transparency or diversity restrict our choices and weaken trust. Let’s discuss what could change when communities reclaim agency over their data, tools, and decisions and how AI can be built with accountability, equity, and shared governance at the core. Global Impact Solutions | Built for Real Needs Impact startups are building the solutions we urgently need - tackling climate, inclusion, education, and health - but often struggle to gain funding and support in systems copying Silicon Valley standards. Let’s share best practices how to level the playing field and support founders and their ventures built for real need. Let’s learn how about their value for communities, not just shareholders, and ensure the digital economy serves everyone. Building Digital Public Goods | Meeting Community Demands Digital public infrastructure provides access to services, opportunities and participation, however yet many communities, especially in rural or marginalized areas, remain excluded. When essential tools are privately owned or unevenly deployed, digital divides deepen. Let’s hear global perspectives how we build shared digital foundations that are open, inclusive, ensuring everyone can benefit from and contribute to the digital future. Five tech giants shouldn’t define our digital lives, own our data and choices. It’s time to pause, reflect and reset. From May 19–22, 2026, Vienna will prove that Digital without Harm is possible, welcoming 500+ changemakers from 90+ countries. Renowned for its commitment to digital humanism , the city offers the perfect backdrop to explore how technology can be ethical, inclusive, and human-centered. Set within ViennaUP , Central Europe’s largest startup and innovation festival, participants will have access to a wide range of events, gatherings, and networking opportunities, connecting with innovators, policymakers, and impact-driven founders from around the world. Vienna is consistently ranked one of the most livable cities in the world, with excellent public transport, vibrant culture, historic architecture, and world-class food and coffee — the congress is the perfect occasion to finally (re)visit this city. ​Curated & Application-Only

Please get your ticket in the external ticket shop Get your Ticket Description Fostering change through real connections. ​The world may feel like it’s going crazy. Instead of complaining, we created FFX – a space for trusted, authentic, and lasting connections. ​We bring together Europe’s leading founders, investors, and leaders to learn from each other, exchange openly, and build relationships that last a lifetime. And yes, this is a women-only event . ​This time, we bundle strengths as we know it's the only path forward for radical change : FFX joins forces with ViennaUp to bring the Austrian and European ecosystems together. Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 19.05.2026 09:00 - 20.05.2026 18:30 The Social Hub Vienna, Nordbahnstrasse 47, 1020 Vienna Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy The Female Founders Experience - time for real connections Welcome to the Female Founders Experience (FFX), the most curated and authentic event for female founders, investors & leaders. The place where women connect on a deep level and build business connections that last for a lifetime. Female Founders About FFX FFX Vienna 2026 Next Locations Become a Partner Your Host: Female Founders, the biggest and fastest-growing community for women in tech in Europe. At Female Founders we connect community, capital, and cultural change to close critical gaps in Europe’s startup ecosystem. Through safe spaces, alliances, and bold ideas, we help founders, investors, and leaders build what others don’t dare to. We are courageous, trustworthy, and transformative. What is FFX FFX is not a conference. It’s a curated experience where women show up honestly, connect deeply, and collaborate intentionally. It’s a movement reshaping the European tech landscape and pushing it toward true equality. Together, we walk the talk. We address the topics that usually stay unspoken. We name the elephant in the room. And we do it one city at a time. Join FFX Vienna Fostering change through real connections. (period) Together, we are growing and connecting the female founders ecosystem - advancing equality in the startup world, championing funding fairness, and driving sustainable innovation. We bring Europe’s leading founders, investors, and leaders together to learn from one another and forge relationships that last a lifetime. And yes, this is a women-only event. FFX VIENNA 2026 19-20 May 2026 The Social Hub Vienna Apply here We focus on Quality over Quantity The Female Founders Experience (FFX) is a curated & an application-only event. It is designed to enable real, meaningful engagement among a selected group of founders, investors and leaders from the corporate & tech ecosystem. This guarantees focused networking and in-depth conversations. No bullshit, just business. You'll experience Joy over FOMO Remember those events where you're supposed to attend 5 sessions at the same time while growing your network? Not at FFX. We provide you with a personalized schedule for the entire event - and we guarantee that you won't miss out on any content or connection. We're a FOMO-free zone. Why you should join if you are a female founder Being a startup founder is exhilarating, but also overwhelming and lonely at times. At FFX, you’ll join an exclusive group of carefully selected female startup founders - from pre-seed to pre-exit stage. This is your space to share wins, struggles, and lessons learned - openly and without judgment. No judgement. Just support. Why you should join if you are a female investor Early-stage investing is all about people. At FFX, you’ll connect with other female investors - business angels, LPs, VC representatives as well as Institutional Investors - with at least two active startup-investments. Gain direct access to promising founders, expand your deal flow, and discover new opportunities for co-investment within a powerful circle of peers you can trust. Find co-investors. Find founders. Why you should join if you are a female leader Leading as a woman comes with unique challenges. At FFX, you’ll meet female leaders shaping the ecosystem - in politics, corporates, or other sectors driving change. Build meaningful peer connections, strengthen your influence, and accelerate your path to the next level of leadership. Grow your network. Speed up your career. unique & curated What participants say about FFX “This has been the best event! It’s truly touching that you’ve organized everything so thoughtfully for us. I really hope FFX will take place again next year!" "Bringing together all the women for a closer and more authentic networking opportunity was greatly appreciated. You have exceeded your goal by more than 100%. This kind of event is unique, and we are looking forward to the next FFX.” “I loved the experience - it was inspiring, empowering and made me reflect. I learned a lot and I want to continue to invest even more in supporting other women.” Preliminary Agenda for FFX Vienna 2026 Please note that the agenda is subject to change. Apply for FFX to unlock the full agenda in the attendee portal. Time 19.05 20.05 - Day 1: Day 2: Morning: Check-In & Coffee Hub Breakfast - FFX Kick-Off Mindful Body Day 2 - Opening Spotlight AI-Ready Reskilling for a New Era of Leadership - Innovation & Startup Perspective Personal Finance - Mindful Body with Verena Stefenelli Due Diligence for Founders - Let's Talk Money, Really Investor Hub Session - Women in Politics Leaders Hub Session Lunch: Networking Lunch Matchmaking Lunch - Mood Check-in Strategic Hormonal Health Afternoon: Hub Sessions: Elephant in the Room Session - Capital Efficient with AI How to run a smart fundraising process - Your First Direct Investment Leaders Hub Session - Mental Health & Burnout Prevention Investors Hub Session - The Biggest Communication Fails Leaders Make Coffee Break - Pricing for Founders Inspiration Spotlight - Women in Critical Infrastructure Who Makes Innovation Happen? Founders, Investors & Leaders in Conversation. - Open Mic FFX Vienna 2026 Closing - Spritzer & True Connections Spritzer & Stay Connected The women leading the conversations that matter These are the voices helping shape the experience in Vienna Proudly supported by This was FFX Barcelona 10th February 2026 I TSH Barcelona A decade shaping the future of female innovation We don’t follow trends, we set them This was FFX Zurich 2025 . 120+ exceptional women from across Europe in one room. A day built on honesty, ambition, and real collaboration. Circle Circle Sharing Circles A safe & supportive space where investors, founders, and leaders share their honest thoughts, experiences & ideas. Focused on a specific topic, guided by an expert. (entire audience) User User Round Tables Insights by selected experts on topics relevant for each group (founders or investors or leaders). Accompanied by in-depth discussions between the experts & the participants. (for each group) Message Message Reverse Pitching In a traditional pitch, startups present their ideas to investors. In Reverse Pitching, the roles are flipped: investors and corporate partners pitch their value beyond capital. (entire audience) Heart Heart Guided Networking Life is all about connections. You will join dedicated networking sessions with participants. Additionally, we will match you with your FFX buddies to boost your business & career. (entire audience) Become a part of fostering change through real connection. Reach out to us to become a Partner. Email Contact us “ Focusing on female leaders and founders was a highly needed and successful decision. The curated setting enabled more authentic networking than typical industry events. From a partner perspective, it made it possible to understand founders’ needs and growth goals much more closely, and we saw a strong appetite for learning and development. This kind of event is unique, and we’re looking forward to the next FFX.” Proudly supported by Female Founders Experience is brought to you by Female Founders, Europe's biggest community for women in the tech ecosystem. title: Road to Global x Tech Summit
descriptionFull:
Two major platforms unite to deliver a broader, more inclusive experience designed for global growth. Road to Global x Tech Summit brings together cultures, industries, opportunities, and meaningful connections in a dynamic two-day program built to accelerate international expansion. Following last year’s milestone of over $20 million in signed deals, this event once again connects you with global partners, new markets, and high-impact networks. Learn how leaders succeeded, where they failed, and what comes next.

09:00–11:00 Investor Breakfast (Ground Floor)

11:30–17:00 Shining Stage – Startup Pitches (First Floor, Saal 6)
11:30–17:00 Exhibition (Saal 1, 2, 4, 5)
11:00–17:00 Networking (Ground Floor)

Please get your ticket in the external ticket shop Get your Ticket Description Two major platforms unite to deliver a broader, more inclusive experience designed for global growth. Road to Global x Tech Summit brings together cultures, industries, opportunities, and meaningful connections in a dynamic two-day program built to accelerate international expansion. Following last year’s milestone of over $20 million in signed deals, this event once again connects you with global partners, new markets, and high-impact networks. Learn how leaders succeeded, where they failed, and what comes next. Across Europe, many events may look similar on the surface yet the world is being reshaped at an unprecedented pace. In this rapidly evolving landscape, remaining confined to a single local market is often the greatest barrier to growth. The path forward is clear: expand into new markets, build international partnerships, and extend your boundaries beyond borders. This year, we are building a far stronger bridge between Europe and Asia. Road to Global, born in Vienna, has become a trusted meeting point for partners and ecosystems from dozens of countries. Tech Summit, one of Asia’s leading innovation platforms, has enabled major cross-border collaborations across multiple markets. Now, these two powerful platforms are joining forces to offer you something greater. At Road to Global x Tech Summit, you will discover concrete pathways to international expansion and form high-value global partnerships that can transform your growth trajectory. If you are ready to move beyond limits and step into global markets, we look forward to welcoming you in Vienna. title: PeaceTech Conference: Advancing Ethical AI in a Sustainable World
descriptionFull:
Innovate. Network. Impact.

It's time to move beyond discussion and start building. Join the PeaceTech Conference 2026 to integrate cutting-edge business strategy with meaningful, next-generation impact.

This year we will explore practical strategies to Advance Ethical AI in a Sustainable World, addressing AI's dual environmental impact: leveraging it for the circular economy while managing data centre footprints. 

From panel discussions and networking opportunities to startup booths and pitching competitions, PTC26 has got you covered.

Whether you are a founder, a developer, or a future industry leader, this is your chance to ensure AI drives a more sustainable world.

title: HOIV FUSION: The Beat of Innovation
location: HOIV – Home of Innovation, Arsenalstraße 11, 1030 Vienna
descriptionFull:
Where Tech, Capital, and Culture Collide. Skip the hype. Get to the deals.

Building on our successful Grand Opening at ViennaUP 2025, we will host a dynamic happening at our hub that merges creativity, technology, and investment into a tangible, experience-driven format.

We are transforming the HOIV hub into the ultimate arena for founders, VCs, and tech builders to connect and close.

Why You Need to Be There:

  • Direct Access: Skip the gatekeepers. Meet face-to-face with investors and industry leaders across our stages, studios, and networking zones.

  • Tangible Action: Dive into curated workshops, rapid-fire pitches, and live music-tech performances.

  • The Full Experience: Navigate interactive tech installations, outdoor relaxation areas, a dynamic food court, and an ViennaUP WarmUP Afterparty and Vernissage.

This is where capital meets creation. Stop talking about innovation and come build it.

Tickets Visitor For anyone looking to explore, connect, and experience the energy of ViennaUP at HOIV. Move freely through showcases, panels, installations, and networking areas, and engage with founders, creatives, and technologists throughout the day. FREE TICKET Startup For startups eager to connect, explore, and engage with the innovation community. Join the HOIV Fusion program to meet investors, founders, creatives, and technologists, exchange ideas, and discover opportunities across technology, business, and the arts. FREE TICKET Investor For investors and VCs looking to discover new projects and connect with founders in a dynamic environment. Engage in conversations, explore emerging ideas, and build relationships across technology, business, and creative industries. FREE TICKET Media For journalists and content creators capturing innovation, creativity, and culture. Access a dynamic environment filled with live moments, conversations, and interactive experiences throughout the HOIV Fusion program. FREE TICKET Ecosystem For ecosystem players, partners, and organizations connecting across industries. Engage with startups, investors, and creatives, explore collaboration opportunities, and be part of an open and interactive environment. FREE TICKET Description Where Tech, Capital, and Culture Collide. Skip the hype. Get to the deals. Building on our successful Grand Opening at ViennaUP 2025, we will host a dynamic festival at our hub that merges creativity, technology, and investment into a tangible, experience-driven format . We are transforming the HOIV hub into the ultimate arena for founders, VCs, and tech builders to connect and close. Why You Need to Be Here: Direct Access: Skip the gatekeepers. Meet face-to-face with investors and industry leaders across our stages, studios, and networking zones. Tangible Action: Dive into curated workshops, rapid-fire pitches , and live music-tech performances . The Full Experience: Navigate interactive tech installations, outdoor relaxation areas , a dynamic food court, and an ViennaUP Warm-Up Afterparty and Vernissage . This is where capital meets creation. Stop talking about innovation and come build it. Agenda All-Day: HOIV registered ViennaUP participants will have a chance to sit down, relax and enjoy the space work within HOIV ViennaUp Workspace . Afternoon: The Innovation Showcase From lunchtime, continuing from our morning HOIV Founder Huddle session, the focus is on exploration and interaction, transforming our hub into a living showcase: Program: Interactive Tech & Art: We will feature hands-on VR and 3D Lab experiences including our VR racing challenge finale that allow guests to engage directly with emerging technologies. Live Creativity: The centerpiece will be an interactive audio-visual art exhibition, featuring live painting and digital art creation, making the creative process a visible and engaging part of the event. High-Impact Panels: The afternoon will host focused discussions on critical topics, including an Investor Panel on current market trends and an "Art Meets Business" Panel exploring investment from family offices and new business models for the creative industries. Build It or Kill it session: Founders present a product idea or strategic direction to a live panel of experts for immediate evaluation. Through structured discussion and expert feedback, each concept is assessed to determine whether it should be built further or refined. Open House & Hub Tours: Attendees can tour our facilities, meet resident startups and artists in their studios, and network in our expansive indoor and outdoor spaces, complete with food trucks and a chill-out atmosphere. Evening: The HOIV Fusion Finale Instead of a traditional closing panel, the evening will transition into a high-concept art and networking event. This allows us to end the day with an experience true to our mission, bringing investors, founders, and creatives together in a relaxed, culturally rich setting for meaningful conversations, accompanied by music from our in-house DJs and a vernissage featuring art pieces from our HOIV artists. It’s a community that combines spaces, events, services, and funding to give people the right environment to create, collaborate, and grow. 2.Who is HOIV for? HOIV is open to anyone with ideas and ambition — from founders and artists to freelancers, educators, corporate teams, and investors. Whether you’re building a company, creating art, supporting innovation, or looking to collaborate, you’ll find your place here. 3. What can I do at HOIV? At HOIV, you can join talks, exhibitions, and networking sessions; connect with collaborators; access expert business services and funding opportunities; and work or create in our flexible spaces and studios. It’s a place where ideas move forward because people from different fields come together. 4. How can I get involved? title: Creative Days Vienna 2026
descriptionFull:
How are digital technologies shaping the future of cultural experiences? On 20 and 21 May 2026, Creative Days Vienna will once again bring together leading international creative professionals for a diverse program of talks, tours, performances, installations and networking formats.

The participants of Creative Days Vienna 2026 will provide substantial impulses for architecture, design, film, gaming, fashion, music and the visual arts. Together, we will discuss the interplay between technological innovations, social change and the creative industries.

Creative Days Vienna 2026 will open with an (Un)Conference exploring how creatives can reshape cultural and digital infrastructures. The opening features keynotes by Shumon Basar and Günseli Yalcinkaya, as well as performances, installations and a club night. Day 2 brings workshops led by Paloma Oliveira, Ramon Reichert, NeverAtHome, Subotron, Marlène Delrive, Area 404 and a Tour presenting Biofabrique Vienna and Creatives for Vienna projects.

title: Fuckup Nights Vienna Vol 52 | ViennaUP 2026 Edition & Party
descriptionFull:
Fuckup Nights ViennaUP 2026: Burn the Script

Last year was just the warm-up. If you thought we went hard before, you haven't seen anything yet. We’re back at ViennaUP to tear down the wall of perfect entrepreneurship and show you the fuckups, blood, sweat, and bad decisions hidden behind the greatest wins.

We are not a polite panel but rather a riot European Entrepreneurship desperately needs. Forget the sanitized lessons learned slides. We’re bringing three fearless speakers to the stage to bleed out the truth and share their most powerful fuckups & lessons learned.

For this very special occasion, we’ll be taking over the legendary U4 - the home of Falco, birthplace of Viennese counter-culture and now one of the ViennaUP event venues.

Come join us, coz this is where the coolest crowd of the entire ViennaUP week gathers to ditch the masks and get real.

Fail loud. Fail proud. Burn the rulebook.

title: ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026
descriptionFull:
Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026! In hand-picked, invitation-style round tables, selected startups meet experienced investors and industry experts for honest conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward.

Expect curated matchmaking by the Vienna Business Agency team after registration to ensure the right mix of people and topics—so every seat at the table matters. All of this happens in iconic Viennese coffee houses, where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged.

If you’re fundraising, scaling, or simply looking for the right network and strategic sparring partners, this is your moment. Apply now and secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026.

After registering, you’ll be asked to apply for one of three table hosts (Investor / Innovation Manager). The Vienna Business Agency team will then curate the final line-up to ensure the right mix of startups and topics at each table. Capacity is limited: 3 startups per host per session, so every seat at the table matters. This format is designed for startups that are beyond the early idea stage—typically with validated traction (e.g., MVP in market, first revenues, growth signals, or a clear scaling/fundraising roadmap). If you’re fundraising, scaling, or looking for strategic sparring and the right network, this is your moment. Sessions take place May 18–22 in morning and afternoon time slots, hosted in iconic Viennese coffee houses—where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged. Apply now to secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026. When applying, please select your preferred host and briefly share your traction, goals, and what you want to discuss at the table. Take a look at this year's speakers, mentors and innovators you can meet: Andrea Buttinger , Venture Architect at 120 Ventures Lucy Izquierdo Greene , Associate at Fund F Cornelia Nussbaumer , Head of Sustainability and Innovation at Wiener Linien GmbH & Co KG Felix Markulin-Wegener , Innovation Manager at Wiener Stadtwerke GmbH Gerald Pollak , Principal at 3VC Günce Önür , General Partner at Startup Wise Guys Heimo Nordberg , Director CX & Innovation at IT-Services der Sozialversicherung GmbH Iva Rakocevic, Senior Investment Manager at Elevator Ventures Joela Elezi , Innovation Manager at Walter Group Klaus Grössinger , General Partner at Onsight Ventures Laura Modre , Investment Manager at ROI Ventures Laurenz Simbruner , General Partner & Co-Founder at PUSH Ventures Lekha Ehrenhoefler-Thailayil , Senior Investment Managerin at karriere.at GmbH Lucanus Polagnoli , Founder & Managing Partner at Calm/Storm Patrik Cesky , Managing Director at aws Gründungsfonds Peter Schliesselberger , Head of Innovation at MAXENERGY Stefan Haubner , General Partner at APEX Ventures Stefan Kreppel , Chief Digital & Innovation Officer at Austria Tourism Stina Seidler , Investment Team at Red Bull Ventures Thomas Greiner , Strategie Owner Innovation at ASFINAG Connor Sattelly , Deals Team at Decile Group Angeley Mullins , Founder & CEO of Aetheris Ventures Astrid Woollard , Co-founder of SMAPE Capital Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 18.05.2026 08:00 - 22.05.2026 17:00 Various Viennese coffee houses Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. title: Road to Global x Tech Summit
descriptionFull:
Two major platforms unite to deliver a broader, more inclusive experience designed for global growth. Road to Global x Tech Summit brings together cultures, industries, opportunities, and meaningful connections in a dynamic two-day program built to accelerate international expansion. Following last year’s milestone of over $20 million in signed deals, this event once again connects you with global partners, new markets, and high-impact networks. Learn how leaders succeeded, where they failed, and what comes next.

Day 2 – 21 May 2026
10:00–16:00 Keynotes & Panels (Ground Floor)
11:00 - 16:00 Exhibition / First Floor - Saal 1, 2 , 4, 5
10:30- 16:00 Networking / Ground Floor
10:00- 16:00 B2B- MatchMaking / First Floor- Saal 6

Please get your ticket in the external ticket shop Get your Ticket Description Two major platforms unite to deliver a broader, more inclusive experience designed for global growth. Road to Global x Tech Summit brings together cultures, industries, opportunities, and meaningful connections in a dynamic two-day program built to accelerate international expansion. Following last year’s milestone of over $20 million in signed deals, this event once again connects you with global partners, new markets, and high-impact networks. Learn how leaders succeeded, where they failed, and what comes next. Across Europe, many events may look similar on the surface yet the world is being reshaped at an unprecedented pace. In this rapidly evolving landscape, remaining confined to a single local market is often the greatest barrier to growth. The path forward is clear: expand into new markets, build international partnerships, and extend your boundaries beyond borders. This year, we are building a far stronger bridge between Europe and Asia. Road to Global, born in Vienna, has become a trusted meeting point for partners and ecosystems from dozens of countries. Tech Summit, one of Asia’s leading innovation platforms, has enabled major cross-border collaborations across multiple markets. Now, these two powerful platforms are joining forces to offer you something greater. At Road to Global x Tech Summit, you will discover concrete pathways to international expansion and form high-value global partnerships that can transform your growth trajectory. If you are ready to move beyond limits and step into global markets, we look forward to welcoming you in Vienna. title: Best practices for expanding your business to Vienna
descriptionFull:
Are you planning to start a business in Vienna and want to learn from people who’ve already done it?

At this event, you will meet founders who have been supported by the Vienna Business Agency and are ready to share their experience of building a business in Vienna. They will provide practical insights and highlight the key topics to consider when founding a company — from the first steps and funding options to legal requirements and networking opportunities.

Participants will also have the chance to ask questions, exchange ideas, and connect with Vienna’s entrepreneurial community.

title: Onco:Innovate Conference
location: Future Health Lab, Alfred-Adler-Straße 1, 1100, Vienna, Austria
descriptionFull:
Onco:Innovate returns to Vienna for its second flagship edition.

The format is a multidisciplinary conference at the crossroads of a high-level oncology symposium and a dynamic startup & innovation summit. Onco:Innovate highlights emerging trends and groundbreaking solutions in oncology, addresses barriers to market entry, and fosters impactful partnerships in the fight against cancer. We unite leading experts from across the international oncology ecosystem, including startups & scaleups, hospitals & clinics, pharma & corporates, patient organizations, policymakers, payers, NGOs, and investors. From medical breakthroughs and precision therapies to AI-driven solutions, funding models, regulatory strategies, and project consortia, Onco:Innovate elevates the different perspectives to improve access, quality of life, and outcomes. This is where collaboration transforms innovation into better cancer care. Join us and help shape the future of oncology.

15:00:00 35550 1,2,6,9 false 0 09:00:00 1,2,5,6 1771594796 273 ViennaUP | Onco:Innovate Conference Programme Log in Onco:Innovate Conference To book a ticket please kindly register or log in here . Tickets Onco:Innovate Ticket For our Onco:Innovate Friends & Partners FREE TICKET Description Onco:Innovate is a multidisciplinary conference at the intersection of a high-level oncology conference and a modern startup & innovation event. The conference focuses on highlighting trends in oncology, overcoming barriers to market entry and creating impactful partnerships in the fight against cancer. We bring together leading experts from across the oncology ecosystem, including innovators, hospitals, pharma & corporates, patient organizations, policymakers, payers, NGOs and investors, to spotlight emerging trends, address barriers to market access, and build partnerships that accelerate the adoption of impactful cancer innovations. From medical breakthroughs and precision therapies to digital and AI-driven solutions, funding models, and regulatory strategies, Onco:Innovate amplifies the patient perspective to improve access, quality of life, and outcomes. This is where collaboration turns innovation into better cancer care. Join us and help shape the future of oncology. Agenda From Breakthroughs to Bottlenecks - When oncology innovation moves faster than access and administration. Strategies to bridge the gap between discovery and delivery. AI & Digital Transformation in Cancer Care: How AI and digital technologies are enabling more precise, efficient, and patient-centred oncology solutions. Collaborating for Impact: Building Networks, Ecosystems, and Funding Pathways in Oncology - Sharing insights on creating partnerships and consortia that foster innovation, accelerate research, and support sustainable oncology solutions. Current Oncology Market Dynamics, Challenges & Solutions - Exploring market trends, challenges, and strategies for effectively navigating the European oncology landscape to optimize innovation adoption. Policy, Regulation & Market Access: Strategies & Best Practice - Analyzing policy frameworks, regulatory pathways, and market access strategies to ensure innovative oncology treatments reach patients efficiently. Funding Models for Oncology Innovators - Exploring how investors support the development and commercialization of breakthrough oncology technologies. Disruptive Innovation in Oncology: Precision Therapies and Next-Gen Diagnostics - Examining emerging therapies, precision medicine, and cutting-edge diagnostic tools that are transforming the way cancer is detected and treated. Prevention, Patient-Centric Care & Quality of Life - Highlighting approaches to improve patient outcomes, enhance quality of life, and emphasize preventive care in modern oncology practices. Oncology Innovation Demo Day - Presentation of market ready innovative solutions, startups and scaleups Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 21.05.2026 09:00 - 15:00 Future Health Lab, Alfred-Adler-Straße 1, 1100 Wien, Austria Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Home - Onco:Innovate Home About us Activities Events Reports Austria 2026 Oncology Innovation Report Onco Accelerator Campaigns News Join Contact ✕ We are the European Oncology Innovation Network ONCO:INNOVATE CLOSING THE GAP FROM INNOVATION TO MARKET Onco:Innovate is an international initiative committed to closing the gap between oncology innovation and market adoption. Our mission is to foster strategic collaboration among key stakeholders, accelerate the time-to-market for ground-breaking solutions, and ensure that patients benefit more quickly from the latest scientific advancements. By connecting startups, healthcare providers, corporates, investors, and public institutions, we drive the development and implementation of transformative cancer care solutions. Through year-round programming, we actively support the journey of oncology innovations from lab to bedside. title: WSA Global Congress
descriptionFull:
WSA Global Congress – Scaling Digital Solutions. For People & Planet.

Meet the people behind the world’s most impactful digital solutions at the WSA Global Congress in Vienna.

Connect with social entrepreneurs, innovators, policymakers, investors, and ecosystem builders working to scale digital solutions with social impact globally.

Interactive morning sessions let you exchange ideas and gain practical insights on ethical AI, digital sovereignty, and how to successfully scale tech solutions that address real societal and environmental challenges.

In the afternoon, experience the live pitches of the WSA Winners 2025, presenting digital impact solutions from around the world, offering inspiration, partnership opportunities, and real-world use cases for impact at scale.

Join this truly global, multi-stakeholder community and leave with new connections, optimistic perspectives, and concrete ideas to grow your own impact.

Don't forget to check out WSA Community Day, too!

Find out more about the event agenda, speakers and more on our website:

Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy WSA Global Congress in Vienna Scaling Digital Solutions: For People & Planet May 19-22 | Vienna, Austria The WSA Global Congress is coming home to its roots in Austria! Expect to make valuable connections, learn new perspectives, and to plug in to a community that believes tech can bring about positive change. Connecting all of that with the agenda 2030 […] About Awards Mission UN Context WSIS Context Board WSA Team Contact FAQs Participate WSA Award Benefits Timeline Rules Apply Young Innovators Benefits Timeline Rules Apply Partner Awards Winners WSA Winners WSA ix3 Winners’ Stories Winners’ Impact Network National Experts National Experts Expert’s Corner Youth Community Youth Ambassadors Youth Community Jurors Speakers Patrons Partners Strategic Partners Hosting Partners Sponsoring Partners Media Partners Events Global Congress Jury Events EYIF UniVation Innovation Events Partner Events Media News & Events Press Releases Clippings Publications Newsletter WSA Global Congress in Vienna Scaling Digital Solutions: For People & Planet May 19-22 | Vienna, Austria The WSA Global Congress is coming home to its roots in Austria! Expect to make valuable connections, learn new perspectives, and to plug in to a community that believes tech can bring about positive change. Connecting all of that with the agenda 2030 and an ongoing cooperation with the UN, the WSA Global Congress connects digital innovation directly to the achievement of the UN Global Goals , turning mindful ideas into measurable global impact. Get your tickets! Main Event Get your tickets for Day 1 and 2, which will be focused on networking, knowledge exchange, and the winner pitches. Day 1 and 2 Deep Dive Day Get your tickets for day 3, a smaller, more specialized final-day program offering participants hands-on workshops or thematic discussions tailored to democracy innovation or startup scaling challenges. Day 3 Topics Agenda Winners Key Participants Barbara Novak welcome statement Why Vienna Visas Partners Topics Digital Sovereignty vs. AI | Control, Choice, Community AI is shaping how we work, learn, and promises great solutions. But digital sovereignty is slipping: control sits far from the people affected, and systems built without transparency or diversity restrict our choices and weaken trust. Let’s discuss what could change when communities reclaim agency over their data, tools, and decisions and how AI can be built with accountability, equity, and shared governance at the core. Global Impact Solutions | Built for Real Needs Impact startups are building the solutions we urgently need - tackling climate, inclusion, education, and health - but often struggle to gain funding and support in systems copying Silicon Valley standards. Let’s share best practices how to level the playing field and support founders and their ventures built for real need. Let’s learn how about their value for communities, not just shareholders, and ensure the digital economy serves everyone. Building Digital Public Goods | Meeting Community Demands Digital public infrastructure provides access to services, opportunities and participation, however yet many communities, especially in rural or marginalized areas, remain excluded. When essential tools are privately owned or unevenly deployed, digital divides deepen. Let’s hear global perspectives how we build shared digital foundations that are open, inclusive, ensuring everyone can benefit from and contribute to the digital future. Five tech giants shouldn’t define our digital lives, own our data and choices. It’s time to pause, reflect and reset. From May 19–22, 2026, Vienna will prove that Digital without Harm is possible, welcoming 500+ changemakers from 90+ countries. Renowned for its commitment to digital humanism , the city offers the perfect backdrop to explore how technology can be ethical, inclusive, and human-centered. Set within ViennaUP , Central Europe’s largest startup and innovation festival, participants will have access to a wide range of events, gatherings, and networking opportunities, connecting with innovators, policymakers, and impact-driven founders from around the world. Vienna is consistently ranked one of the most livable cities in the world, with excellent public transport, vibrant culture, historic architecture, and world-class food and coffee — the congress is the perfect occasion to finally (re)visit this city. title: Smart City SuMMit 2026
location: Climate Lab, Spittelauer Lände 45, 8th floor, 1090 Vienna
descriptionFull:
Smart City SuMMit 2026: Let’s Co-Create Circular Cities!

Digitalization is more than a buzzword—it is a catalyst for a circular urban economy. At the Smart City SuMMit 2026, we are moving beyond theory to focus on digital solutions for circular cities that work. Our mission is to bridge the gap between high-level strategy and real-world implementation by connecting impactful innovators with bold industry leaders.

Why Join the SuMMit?

  • High-Speed Impact: We skip the small talk. Our curated kick-off ensures you meet relevant partners in the very first slot.
  • Reverse Pitches: Hear directly from "solution seekers" about the real-world innovation challenges that need to be solved now.
  • Marketplace of Solutions: Discover around 15 hand-picked solution providers showcasing digital solutions for the circular economy.
  • Funding : Gain insights from funding agency experts on funding and scaling circular solutions in Vienna.

Who Should Join?

We invite business leaders, industry experts, decision-makers, and entrepreneurs to discover market-ready solutions and initiate high-impact partnership

title: Manufacturing Day
descriptionFull:
The Manufacturing Day is the leading event for the manufacturing industry during ViennaUP. It brings together more than 500 startups, key industrial players, investors, researchers and experts from 40+ different countries. The event features startup and corporate pitching sessions, inspiring keynotes and discussions with renowned global speakers, matchmaking and networking opportunities, and showcases the latest innovations and technologies from European research. 

Manufacturing Day 2026 focuses on one of the most critical challenges for the global industrial economy: how to successfully scale manufacturing ventures into competitive, resilient and globally operating companies. Manufacturing innovation is thriving, yet many startups struggle to scale from pilot to global production. Manufacturing Day 2026 explores what enables successful industrial scale-up, examining investment models, policy frameworks and partnerships that turn innovation into impact.

Agenda 09:30 - 10:30 Admission 10:30 - 12:30 Pitching - Startups & Corporates 12:30 - 14:00 Networking Lunch & Matchmaking 14:00 - 16:30 Investing in Europe's Manufacturing Future - Keynotes & Panel Discussion 16:30 - 20:00 Networking & Matchmaking Accessibility Wheel-chair accessible venue 21.05.2026 09:30 - 20:00 Novotel Wien Hauptbahnhof, Canettistrasse 6, 1100 Vienna, Austria Please note that photos and video may be taken during the event for documentation or promotion purposes. Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy Home | Manufacturing Day 2026 The Manufacturing Day is the leading event for the manufacturing industry during ViennaUP, the largest decentralised startup festival in Europe. Manufacturing Day 2026 Manufacturing Day 2026 21 May 2026 | Vienna, Austria Home Agenda Project Expo Become a partner Sponsors Speakers Log in Register Log in Register Log in Register Info Keynote Speaker Infineon Startup Challenge About ViennaUp Manufacturing Day 2026 21 May 2026 | 1100 Vienna, Austria Canettistrasse 6 Novotel Wien Hauptbahnhof Register now Registration open until 21 May 2026 This year's topic: Invest to scale. Manufacturing Day 2026 focuses on one of the most critical challenges for the global industrial economy: how to successfully scale manufacturing ventures into competitive, resilient and globally operating companies . While early-stage innovation in manufacturing is thriving, many promising ventures struggle to move from pilot projects to large-scale production and international market leadership. The reasons are complex, ranging from access to growth capital and industrial infrastructure to regulatory environments, talent availability and collaboration between startups, corporates and the public sector. The event explores how different manufacturing ecosystems support or constrain this scale-up journey, and what enables some companies to grow faster, expand internationally and industrialise successfully. It looks at diverse investment models, policy frameworks and partnership approaches that shape how manufacturing innovation turns into industrial impact. Manufacturing Day 2026 brings together investors, founders, industry leaders and policymakers to identify the practical levers needed to accelerate manufacturing scale-ups: from financing and industrial capacity to market access and global expansion. The focus is on learning across systems, challenging assumptions, and defining what is needed to build the next generation of resilient, world-class manufacturing companies. What is Manufacturing Day? The Manufacturing Day is the leading event for the manufacturing industry during ViennaUP , the largest decentralised startup festival in Europe. During this landmark event with more than 500 participants from over 50 countries, EIT Manufacturing is bringing together startups, key industrial players, investors, researchers and experts to celebrate the achievements and potential of the European manufacturing industry. Renowned speakers from all over the world provide insights into hot topics in the industry, bringing new solutions and ideas to the table to make manufacturing more innovative and thus create a competitive advantage. The Manufacturing Day aims to showcase the latest innovations and technologies that are driving this transition and to inspire the next generation of manufacturing professionals to take an active role in shaping the future of the industry. The event offers a varied and rich programme for and with startups in the manufacturing industry and is a platform for industry representatives to exchange ideas and network. Save Manufacturing Day 2026 to your calendar Make sure to have 21 May 2026 reserved for Manufacturing Day during ViennaUP! Add to calendar #SaveTheDate: Get ready for Manufacturing Day - coming up on 21 May 2026 in Vienna To get into the right mood, walk down memory lane with us and see some impressions from Manufacturing Day 2025 in the video below. We are working hard on creating an amazing programme with outstanding speakers for you. Save your spot and get your free ticket now! We are looking forward to seeing you on 21 May 2026 in Vienna. Your EIT Manufacturing East Team :) Who is behind the Manufacturing Day? Hello there, we are the team of EIT Manufacturing East, a group of experts that helps the manufacturing industry to become more innovative, more competitive, more resilient and more sustainable. Out of our office in Vienna, we work with startups, SMEs, large corporations, universities, research institutes and other professionals in the manufacturing sector on their innovation activities and challenges. We support them to find the right partners, solutions, technologies and talents for growing their businesses, expanding their markets, optimising their production and enhancing their efficiency and sustainability. We work with more than 1,000 European industry startups, we collaborate with top-notch universities and research institutes and we bring in all the big and small players from the business side along with the visible and the hidden champions to our innovation ecosystem. Together with the colleagues from our offices in Germany, Spain, Italy, Sweden, Greece and France, we follow a true European approach, enabling cooperations across company and national borders. EIT Manufacturing is the largest innovation network for manufacturing in Europe. Supported by the European Institute of Innovation & Technology (EIT), a body of the European Union, we bring together the leading industry stakeholders from business, academia and research. Fueled by a strong interdisciplinary and trusted community, our activities add unique value to European products, processes, and services – and inspire the creation of globally competitive and sustainable manufacturing. EIT Manufacturing is headquartered in Paris, France and has a network of innovation hubs across Europe: Vienna (Austria), Darmstadt (Germany), Milan (Italy), Gothenburg (Sweden), San Sebastian (Spain) and Athens (Greece). title: Creative Days Vienna 2026
descriptionFull:
How are digital technologies shaping the future of cultural experiences? On 20 and 21 May 2026, Creative Days Vienna will once again bring together leading international creative professionals for a diverse program of talks, tours, performances, installations and networking formats.

The participants of Creative Days Vienna 2026 will provide substantial impulses for architecture, design, film, gaming, fashion, music and the visual arts. Together, we will discuss the interplay between technological innovations, social change and the creative industries.

Creative Days Vienna 2026 will open with an (Un)Conference exploring how creatives can reshape cultural and digital infrastructures. The opening features keynotes by Shumon Basar and Günseli Yalcinkaya, as well as performances, installations and a club night. Day 2 brings workshops led by Paloma Oliveira, Ramon Reichert, NeverAtHome, Subotron, Marlène Delrive, Area 404 and a Tour presenting Biofabrique Vienna and Creatives for Vienna projects.

title: INSIDEOUT Summit
descriptionFull:
We're racing toward "faster, bigger, newer" — but building the future without upgrading the builders. 72% of innovators face mental health challenges. AI advances exponentially while human capacity stays unchanged.

INSIDEOUT Summit 2026 isn't just another conference. It's an immersive experience where 300+ founders, investors, and innovation leaders from 10+ countries explore what happens when inner growth drives outer impact.

Through keynotes, panels, lightning talks, a startup showcase, and formats like Lego Serious Play networking, you'll walk away with:

  • New perspectives on leading in a world that moves faster than we do
  • Real connections rooted in shared purpose, not business card exchanges
  • Practical tools for resilience and high performance as an innovator

Four themes. One day. A shift in how you build. Human 2.0 · Purposeful Innovation · Authentic Connection · Growth Unlocked

Ready to build the future from the inside out?

Agenda 09:30-10:30 - Registration & Breakfast - Doors open. Take your time to arrive, check in, and settle into the space. Pick up your badge, ease into the atmosphere, and start the day with relaxed, meaningful conversations. Enjoy a warm breakfast powered by Purora - a simple, comforting start designed to bring people together before the day unfolds. 10:30-10:50 - Opening - We begin by coming together. Opening remarks by our co-host partner Mastercard Austria and hosting partner weXelerate set the tone for the day, welcoming you into the experience, sharing what lies ahead, and inviting you to be fully part of the conversations to come. 10:50-11:15 - Keynote: Human 2.0 - Keynote by Phil Dobson on Human 2.0, exploring the future of human potential and transformation. 11:15-11:50 - Lightning Talks - Five ideas. Five voices. Five short moments that might stay with you longer than expected. Powered by FFG, this session brings together a curated lineup of innovators presenting solutions that are actively shaping a better world, from bold concepts to real, funded initiatives already in motion. Expect a series of 5-minute lightning talks: concise, inspiring stories that offer a glimpse into what’s possible when innovation meets purpose 11:50- 12:20 - Panel: “Humanizing Impact Finance” - As part of INSIDEOUT Summit’s core theme - “Humanizing Innovation” - this panel explores the idea that meaningful, lasting impact begins with people, not just capital or products. “Humanizing Impact Finance” brings together voices from across the ecosystem to discuss how financial decisions can be guided by empathy, ethics, and real human needs. From investors to founders, the conversation will highlight how purpose-driven capital can create sustainable change, why human-centered approaches matter more than ever, and how impact finance can move beyond numbers to truly transform communities. 12.20-12:40 - Coffee break - Grab a cup and recharge for what’s next. A great moment to reflect - or meet someone new. 12:40-13:30 - Roundtable Discussions - Step into a shared conversation. This session brings together 5+ parallel table discussions, all centred around a common theme, exploring collaboration in the innovation space. Move beyond passive listening and take a seat at the table: exchange ideas, challenge viewpoints, and co-create insights in a more personal, interactive setting. Powered by: REDPreneur 12:40-13:30 - Moderated Networking - LEGO® Serious Play® - A playful, moderated networking session using LEGO® Serious Play®, designed to spark meaningful connections, fresh perspectives, and engaging conversations in an interactive and inspiring way. 13:30-14:30 - Lunch break - Time to recharge, connect with fellow participants, and spark new conversations in a relaxed atmosphere. 14:30-15:00 - Keynote: Growth Unlocked - Keynote “Growth Unlocked,” powered by Mastercard , exploring new pathways to growth and innovation. 15:00- 15:30 - Panel Discussion "Inside Funding Devisions" - “Growth Unlocked” VC Panel, powered by Mastercard , featuring insights on investment trends and scaling ventures. 15:30-16:00 - Fireside chat "The Human Side of Success" - An honest conversation, powered by Mastercard. In this fireside chat, two founders take the stage to share the journeys behind what we often simply call “success.” Through personal stories, pivotal decisions, and lessons learned along the way, they offer a more human perspective on building something meaningful. Expect real insights, honest reflections, and moments that go beyond the highlight reel. 16:00-16:30 - Coffee Break - A perfect moment to recharge, refresh, and connect with fellow participants. 16:30-17:20 - Human 2.0 Mastermind - What does it mean to evolve as a human in a world shaped by constant change, technology, and increasing demands? In this powerful mastermind session, Phil Dobson explores the concept of “Human 2.0” - a new way of thinking, performing, and living with intention. Blending mindset, performance, and personal transformation, this session will challenge participants to rethink their limits, unlock higher levels of clarity and resilience, and step into a more conscious, elevated version of themselves. Expect practical insights, thought-provoking perspectives, and a space designed to spark real internal shifts. 16:20-17:20 - Mentoring Session s - Three rounds of 20-minute one-on-one sessions, offering personalized guidance, insights, and valuable connections. 17:20-17:45 - Wrap up - We’ll close the day with a few final thoughts and thank-yous. Then it’s time to celebrate together! 17:45 - 22:00 - Evening Networking & After Party - Keep the INSIDEOUT energy going! Connect with fellow attendees, spark inspiring conversations, and enjoy an evening full of good vibes. Drinks, snacks, and a relaxed atmosphere are on us, the perfect way to unwind, mingle, and celebrate the day together. The Innovation Crisis We are racing toward "faster, bigger, newer." But startup founders, fintech innovators, and corporate leaders are building the future without upgrading the builders. The Reality: A growing burnout crisis shows that 72% of entrepreneurs experience mental health challenges, while AI advances exponentially and human capacity stays fundamentally unchanged. In an increasingly digitised and saturated world, this fuels a deeper hunger — a craving for genuine human connection that technology alone cannot replace. We need innovation with purpose. INSIDEOUT Summit is the conference to tackle that. Join 300+ Purpose-Driven Innovators at the conference Who you will meet: We bring together the people building the future, not just talking about it. Our audience is built around startup founders: from purpose-driven builders tackling global challenges to fintech innovators reshaping how money moves. They are joined by ecosystem leaders from accelerators and the public sector, corporate innovators, impact investors and venture capital (VC) representatives actively looking for their next bet. We believe that sustainable innovation starts with the individual; therefore, we build the builders, not just the tech. Join honest conversations about the decisions and relationships that turn potential into momentum. Purposeful Innovation Apply science, technology, and creativity to solve the world's biggest challenges rather than just following trends. This conference pillar is about discovering startups and solutions that truly matter for our collective future. From climate tech to deep science, we showcase how purposeful engineering can create systemic change while maintaining a focus on ethical and long-term impact. Authentic Connection Create honest, cross-sector relationships that go far beyond the surface-level networking of traditional conferences. From our interactive "Lego Serious Play" to moderated networking, we facilitate the social glue and psychological safety that make true innovation possible. A conference that engages in all levels. Radical Collaboration Move beyond surface-level networking. We facilitate the "glue" that makes innovation possible through authentic, cross-sector relationships and unique interactive formats. Future-Proof Leadership Unlock inner growth and neuroscience-backed strategies to meet the demands of today’s world by learning with pannels, talks and workshops. title: International Blockchain Day: The New Money: Stablecoins, Crypto, CBDC and the Power of Tokenization
descriptionFull:
International Blockchain Day – The New Money

The global financial system is entering a new era. At International Blockchain Day, we explore how stablecoins, crypto assets, CBDCs and tokenization are redefining money, markets and value creation. From policy and infrastructure to real-world adoption, the event connects leaders from finance, technology, regulation and the real economy to shape what comes next.

Stream 1 – Global Developments and Lessons for Europe
Discover how international markets are evolving, what regulatory frameworks are emerging, and which global use cases Europe can learn from to stay competitive in digital finance.

Stream 2 – Stablecoins: Powering the Next Financial System
Stablecoins are becoming the backbone of on-chain finance. This stream dives into payments, settlement, compliance, infrastructure and the role of stablecoins in the future monetary system.

Stream 3 – Digital Assets as an Investment Class – The New Money in Motion
From tokenization to institutional adoption, explore how digital assets are transforming portfolios, capital markets and investment strategies.

title: Corporate Venturing Summit
descriptionFull:
REINVENT OR DECLINE - How can corporations transform and grow in challenging times?

We will kick off the Corporate Venturing Summit with a series of engaging fishbowl sessions designed to turn insight into action: Strategy & Setup (making smart choices about where to play and how to win), Reinvent & Transform (rewiring the core to stay relevant and competitive), and Build & Grow (creating new businesses that can succeed beyond the core).

In the evening, we’ll explore how to build a "Reinvention Engine" that leverages simplicity, AI, and new technologies as a core capability. We’ll then dive into a C-level discussion on moving from research to innovation to implementation - and what commonly goes wrong in corporate setups.

The day wraps up with networking over dinner and drinks.

Learn more Set the Right Framework We build the foundation for innovation to scale – an innovation setup with clear governance, lean processes, smart KPIs, empowered teams, and a culture that actually moves ideas forward with speed and focus. Learn more Enable Fast Execution We use innovative methods and processes from the startup space for quick validation and scaling – taking a hands-on, results-driven approach that turns ideas into measurable impact. Learn more Success in Numbers 10+ Years of corporate strategy and innovation consulting experience 500+ Corporate innovation projects carried out 300+ Clients successfully consulted 20+ Countries where projects were delivered References Energy Enable & Mobilize: The Platform Bridging Strategy and Startup Innovation OMV Sphere helps OMV turn strategic sustainability and business challenges into startup collaborations by tapping into external innovation ecosystems. The platform has delivered five research and scouting projects, including reusable e-commerce packaging, sustainable products from spent coffee grounds, and green fuel certificates for aviation. Reinvent & Transform: Reliable Drone Inspections Beyond GNSS Limits An automated drone survey solution enables consistent dam inspections through AI-based navigation and tracking, even in GNSS-denied environments. Pilot trials with Skydio and Dronemajor show its potential to replace manual flights with safer, more reliable, and automated inspection workflows. Reinvent & Transform: Online Monitoring for Variable Frequency Drives ENI assessed non-intrusive technologies for real-time monitoring of Variable Frequency Drives to enable early anomaly detection and predictive insights. The initiative identified Electrical Signature Analysis as the most suitable approach and narrowed a highly specialized market to a focused set of leading providers. Strategy & Setup: Professionalizing Innovation to Power the Green Tech Transition Burgenland Energie professionalized its innovation system to support its transformation into a Green Tech player. The initiative defined an innovation vision, created transparency across ideas and partnerships, established clear processes and decision criteria, and set up a dedicated sandbox team. Grow & Build: Vehicle-to-Grid: Turning EVs into Grid Assets A Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) solution enables electric vehicles to feed energy back into the grid through bidirectional charging, trading platform access, and AI-based optimization. Successful pilots show how EVs can serve as flexible grid assets, helping operators like Moon Porsche balance the grid and unlock new revenue streams. Reinvent & Transform: Advancing Structural Integrity Monitoring for Oil & Gas Assets To address the high cost, risk, and limited visibility of periodic structural integrity inspections for onshore and offshore assets, ENI assessed and implemented advanced structural integrity technologies, thereby reducing scaffolding, downtime, and human exposure in hazardous environments. Reinvent & Transform: Laying the Foundation for Scalable Carbon Capture OMV sharpened its CCUS strategy by assessing how direct carbon capture can support low-carbon hydrocarbon production. A comprehensive market analysis translated this into strategic options and investment hypotheses, guiding plans to scale CO₂ storage and partnerships across the North Sea, Central and Eastern Europe, and the Middle East. Strategy & Setup: Wertstatt 8: Inventing the Future of Energy from Within Energie AG Oberösterreich built Wertstatt8 as a corporate venture studio to drive venture building and spin-off creation beyond its core utility business. The initiative developed and scaled new energy ventures, including Linus for data-driven energy optimization and E-Fairteiler for community-based solar power sharing. Reinvent & Transform: Reducing Wind Turbine Downtime Through Predictive AI Resulting from the need to reduce wind turbine downtime and maintenance costs, VERBUND piloted an AI-based predictive maintenance solution to anticipate component failures and improve maintenance planning. Grow & Build: Advancing Energy Ideas Through Venture Building OMV used the cross-company venture building format Pioneers.Peak to turn exploration beyond its core business into validated new opportunities. In a three-month program, OMV developed and tested concepts in energy storage, biomass utilization, and CO₂ certificate management, leading to C-level backing and the handover of two validated concepts. Grow & Build: From Idea to Market-Ready Energy Venture TTTech and VERBUND established a clear foundation for a joint corporate venture in high-end, grid-serving energy management by sharpening market focus, customer segments, and competitive positioning. The collaboration resulted in a defined business model, clear USPs, and a concrete go-to-market and launch roadmap. Enable & Mobilize: Venture Clienting as an Engine for Energy Innovation VERBUND used venture clienting to connect industry leaders with startups and implement innovative technologies across the organization. The program turned business challenges into 29 pilot projects with 22 corporate partners in areas such as energy management, AI-based market intelligence, predictive maintenance, and digital process control. Reinvent & Transform: Energy Management App Verbund Energy for Customer (VEC) reshaped their digital customer interface based on a thorough market analysis and customer survey by designing a new end-customer app in order to create transparency under existing contracts and act as a channel for direct communication and information. Reinvent & Transform: AI-Based Market Intelligence for Energy Trading VERBUND and YUKKA Lab implemented an AI solution to increase transparency in energy price movements by linking intraday, day-ahead, and futures prices with news, market data, and regulatory developments. Following a successful pilot, the tool was permanently integrated, enabling more informed trading and market decisions. Reinvent & Transform: AI-Based Load Management and Forecasting for Smart Charging SMATRICS and Ogre.AI optimized charging point utilization and energy costs by implementing an AI-based load management solution enabling real-time monitoring, forecasting, and load shifting, thereby strengthening smart charging capabilities across operations. Financial Services and Insurance Reinvent & Transform: Scaling Fintech Innovation Through Open Collaboration Visa used the Visa Everywhere Initiative to identify and scale high-potential fintech solutions addressing challenges such as NFC and digital payments, API-based money transfers, supply-chain visibility, and exponential technologies. The program attracted 100+ high-quality startups annually across Europe and APAC. Reinvent & Transform: Goodbye Paper Receipts, Hello Digital Clarity A major German bank introduced Digital Receipts, allowing customers to receive their receipts directly in the banking app after paying in-store. The solution simplifies expense tracking and returns and gives customers instant, organized access to their purchase history in one central place. title: Longevity Business Forum
descriptionFull:
The Longevity Business Forum is a premier event bringing together global leaders from science, healthcare, technology, and investment to explore how we can extend not just lifespan — but healthspan.

Hosted in Vienna, the forum serves as a meeting point for researchers, entrepreneurs, and policymakers committed to building a thriving longevity ecosystem. Through expert discussions, startup pitches, and an innovation award, the event highlights the latest breakthroughs transforming the way we age.
