Zum Inhalt springen Jetzt LONERA Gesundheitsbotschafter:in werden! Startseite Über Uns Community Business Forum Speakers Agenda Startup Award 2026 Ressourcen Mitmachen Startseite Über Uns Community Business Forum Speakers Agenda Startup Award 2026 Ressourcen Mitmachen Gemeinsam die Zukunft der gesunden Langlebigkeit gestalten Wir sind die führende Community für Wissenschaft, Innovation und Lifestyle rund um gesunde Langlebigkeit. Werde Teil einer Bewegung, die Zukunft gestaltet. Jetzt LONERA Gesundheitsbotschafter:in werden Warum Longevity Hub Austria? Die Forschung ist eindeutig: Wir können heute Einfluss auf unsere Lebensspanne und -qualität nehmen. Doch Wissen allein reicht nicht – wir brauchen Gemeinschaft, Inspiration und Umsetzung. Longevity Hub Austria ist der Ort, an dem kluge Köpfe, mutige Pionier:innen und Gesundheitsinteressierte zusammenkommen, um gesunde Langlebigkeit für alle möglich zu machen. Fakten, die bewegen: Mitglieder, Botschafter:innen, die mit uns lernen wollen 10+ Events im Jahr voller Impulse Starke Partner aus Wissenschaft & Praxis Jede Stimme, jede Idee zählt – gemeinsam schaffen wir Veränderung. Unsere Community Im Longevity Hub Austria triffst du auf Ärzt:innen, Forscher:innen, Unternehmer:innen, Biohacker:innen und Gesundheitsenthusiast:innen. Unterschiedliche Perspektiven – ein gemeinsames Ziel: Mehr gesunde Jahre, mehr Lebensqualität. Zur Community Events Unsere Veranstaltungen sind mehr als Vorträge – sie sind Erlebnisse, die Wissen lebendig machen. Hier lernst du direkt von internationalen Expert:innen, entdeckst neue Trends und baust Verbindungen auf, die dein Leben verändern können. Zu den Veranstaltungen Fragen & Antworten (FAQ) Was ist der Longevity Hub Austria? Der Longevity Hub Austria ist ein interdisziplinäres Netzwerk, das Forschung, Innovation und Gesundheitsinteressierte verbindet, um die gesunden Lebensjahre in Österreich zu verlängern und Langlebigkeit als gesellschaftliches und wirtschaftliches Thema zu etablieren. Warum wurde der Longevity Hub Austria gegründet? Weil die Lebenserwartung steigt, die gesunden Lebensjahre aber stagnieren. Es braucht neue Plattformen, die Wissenschaft, Unternehmen und Gesellschaft zusammenbringen, um Lösungen für Gesundheit, Prävention und Langlebigkeit zu entwickeln. Was ist die Mission des Longevity Hub Austria? Wir schaffen ein inspirierendes Format rund um Gesundheit, Prävention und Langlebigkeit – eine Plattform, die Menschen und Unternehmen verbindet und Österreich als führende Stimme für Langlebigkeit in Europa etabliert. Welche Themen stehen im Fokus? Von Medizin & Prävention über Ernährung, Fitness, Mental Health, Lifestyle & Wellness bis hin zu Biohacking, Wearables, Epigenetik, Unternehmensgesundheit und Forschung & Innovation. Was ist „Lonera“? Lonera ist die Community-Plattform des Longevity Hub Austria mit inspirierenden Events (Talks, Walks, Fest) Welche Events gibt es? Lonera Talk: Paneldiskussion mit Expert:innen aus Sport & Gesundheit. Lonera Walk: Gemeinsames 5 km-Walking „Speedy Walk“ in Wien und anderen Städten. Lonera Fest: Ein großes Lifestyle-Event mit Mitmach-Trainings, Vorträgen, Expo und dem Lonera Award. Wer kann Mitglied werden? Gesundheitsinteressierte, Unternehmen (klein, mittel, groß), Startups, Expert:innen sowie wissenschaftliche Institutionen. Welche Vorteile habe ich als Gründungsmitglied? Exklusives Netzwerk, Zugang zu allen Events, Networking mit Startups, Investor:innen und Forschung sowie „First Mover Advantage“. Wie kann ich Botschafter:in werden? Die das Thema Gesundheitsprävention glaubwürdig vertreten, aktiv mitgestalten und zur Sichtbarkeit des Netzwerks beitragen Welche Rolle spielt Forschung im Hub? Der Hub versteht sich als Brücke zwischen Wissenschaft und Praxis. Mitglieder haben Zugang zu internationalen Studien, Pilotprojekten und Innovationspartnerschaften und können eigene Forschungsthemen einbringen. Wie kann ich den Longevity Hub Austria erreichen? Erika Krizsan (Ecosystem Lead) 📞 +43 664 189 1810 📧 e.krizsan@longevityhub.at Die Zukunft der Gesundheit beginnt heute – und du kannst dabei sein. Werde Teil einer Community, die inspiriert, unterstützt und vorangeht. Jetzt LONERA Gesundheitsbotschafter:in werden LongevityHub – die Community für gesunde Langlebigkeit. Gemeinsam mehr erreichen. title: ClawCon #3 - ViennaUP edition
location: Prisma by Lumia, Am Grünen Prater 2, 1020 Vienna
descriptionFull:
For space lobsters, humans, and everything in between
The Claw is back and proud to be an official part of ViennaUP! Join us for a high-energy evening dedicated to the OpenClaw movement—the world’s fastest-growing open-source AI agent ecosystem. Whether you’re a builder, a hacker, or just "Claw-curious," this is the hub for the new Agent Economy.
What’s on the Agenda?

  • Lightning Talks @ 5 Mins: No boring PowerPoints. Just raw, 5-minute demos of the coolest and weirdest use cases—from autonomous home setups to AI-driven "vibe coding" projects that run 24/7.
  • Community over Corporate: Experience the "lobster" atmosphere where technical fails are celebrated, and "how did you build that?" is the only question that matters.
  • Meet The New Agentic Hub: Hosted by Lumia, your dedicated space for the agent economy.

Don’t miss the ViennaUP edition of the world's most creative AI meetup and take the chance to connect with the builders shaping the future of decentralized AI.

title: ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026
descriptionFull:
Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026! In hand-picked, invitation-style round tables, selected startups meet experienced investors and industry experts for honest conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward.

Expect curated matchmaking by the Vienna Business Agency team after registration to ensure the right mix of people and topics—so every seat at the table matters. All of this happens in iconic Viennese coffee houses, where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged.

If you’re fundraising, scaling, or simply looking for the right network and strategic sparring partners, this is your moment. Apply now and secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026.

We will get back to you via email with the result. FREE TICKET Description Step into the Viennese founder spirit at the ViennaUP Coffee House Sessions 2026 : invitation-style round tables where selected startups meet experienced investors and innovation managers for formal conversations, sharp questions, and connections that can move your venture forward. After registering, you’ll be asked to apply for one of three table hosts (Investor / Innovation Manager). The Vienna Business Agency team will then curate the final line-up to ensure the right mix of startups and topics at each table. Capacity is limited: 3 startups per host per session, so every seat at the table matters. This format is designed for startups that are beyond the early idea stage—typically with validated traction (e.g., MVP in market, first revenues, growth signals, or a clear scaling/fundraising roadmap). If you’re fundraising, scaling, or looking for strategic sparring and the right network, this is your moment. Sessions take place May 18–22 in morning and afternoon time slots, hosted in iconic Viennese coffee houses—where big ideas and bold decisions have always belonged. Apply now to secure your chance to join the Coffee House Sessions at ViennaUP 2026. When applying, please select your preferred host and briefly share your traction, goals, and what you want to discuss at the table. title: Founders & Future Founders Breakfast
descriptionFull:
Founders & Future Founders Breakfast
22 May | 09:00–12:00 | ViennaUP
Hosted by Calm/Storm x WU Ignite Ventures


A relaxed morning for the next generation of builders in Austria. Founders & Future Founders Breakfast brings together early-stage founders, operators, students, and ambitious minds who are either already building — or seriously thinking about it.


Hosted as part of ViennaUP by Calm/Storm and WU Ignite, this session is about honest conversations around going from 0 → 1. No pitch stage, no panels for show just practical insights, real experiences, and space to connect with others at a similar stage.

What to expect:

  • Short founder and investor insights on getting started
  • Practical perspectives on early traction, funding, and mistakes
  • Open Q&A and networking with peers
  • A room full of people who are building, or about to

WU Ignite Ventures backs founders at day zero. Calm/Storm invests early in ambitious teams building in digital health. Together, we want to create a space where ideas can turn into action.

title: Creative Catalyst Aperture
descriptionFull:
What does it take to bring a creative business to European scale?

Aperture is the launch of Creative Catalyst Austria, an innovation pathway programme for Austrian creative businesses moving beyond borders, designed to push creative businesses beyond local markets and into European scale, through tailored innovation and growth pathways.

The day traces the Creative Catalyst journey from provocation and foresight to hands-on collaboration. The morning is dedicated to talks from practitioners working at the intersection of materials and creative technology, perspectives that highlight emerging shifts shaping Europe's creative economy, and where creative businesses can position themselves within it.

In the afternoon, the focus turns to application. Participants take part in smaller sessions with members of the Creative Catalyst network: coaches, investors, and industry experts working directly with businesses on their next steps. Alongside these sessions, participants can also learn more about current opportunities from EIT Culture & Creativity and explore how to engage with upcoming programmes and funding calls.

title: Open House @AI Factory Austria AI:AT
descriptionFull:
Yes, we are open! The AI Factory Austria AI:AT opens the doors of its brand new Innovation Center and Coworking Space during ViennaUP for startups, scale-ups and innovation-driven companies, who want to experience practical, hands-on AI!

From 9:30 AM to 04:00 PM you can visit our space, talk to our consultants about our services or participate in one of our free workshops:

  • AI Opportunity Sprint (10:00 AM-11:30 AM) - Identify and prioritize real AI use cases for your startup, including impact/effort scoring and next steps.
  • Build Your First AI Agent (1:00 PM–2:30 PM) - Create a simple AI agent or automation workflow you can immediately test and use.
  • How to Trustworthy AI (3:00 PM–4:00 PM) - A clear, practical overview of EU AI Act, GDPR and ethical AI - no legal background required.

Join us where the future of AI lives! Registration for Open House and workshops is required.

❗️Please note: workshop is limited to 24 seats.

✨ As a small extra incentive, workshop participants will receive a surprise goodie bag ✨

title: WSA Community Day
location: Track 1: das forum, Operngasse 17-21/11. OG, 1040 Vienna; Track 2: Vienna Business Agency, Mariahilfer Straße 20, 1070 Vienna
descriptionFull:
On the final day of the WSA Global Congress, participants can dive deeper into the topics most relevant to their work. Two parallel tracks run simultaneously, so make sure to choose the ticket that best fits your interests and goals in the next step.

Track 1: Democracy in the Digital Age
This highly interactive morning in partnership with Urban Innovation Austria brings together international experts and entrepreneurs to discuss the challenges and opportunities of democracy in the digital era, exploring how digital solutions can strengthen democratic values while addressing threats such as misinformation, platform dominance, and digital dependency.

Track 2: Impact Founders Lab – Tools for Scaling Your Startup
Designed for impact entrepreneurs and tech startups, this hands-on workshop series hosted at the Vienna Business Agency provides practical tools to strengthen your business while staying true to your mission, focusing on real founder challenges.

Workshops include:

  • Impact That Pays Off: Measuring What Matters
  • Business Models for Mission-Driven Startups
  • Founder Resilience & Team Health
  • Play to Pivot: Creative Problem Solving for Founders

Programme Overview Imprint Privacy Policy WSA Global Congress in Vienna Scaling Digital Solutions: For People & Planet May 19-22 | Vienna, Austria The WSA Global Congress is coming home to its roots in Austria! Expect to make valuable connections, learn new perspectives, and to plug in to a community that believes tech can bring about positive change. Connecting all of that with the agenda 2030 […] About Awards Mission UN Context WSIS Context Board WSA Team Contact FAQs Participate WSA Award Benefits Timeline Rules Apply Young Innovators Benefits Timeline Rules Apply Partner Awards Winners WSA Winners WSA ix3 Winners’ Stories Winners’ Impact Network National Experts National Experts Expert’s Corner Youth Community Youth Ambassadors Youth Community Jurors Speakers Patrons Partners Strategic Partners Hosting Partners Sponsoring Partners Media Partners Events Global Congress Jury Events EYIF UniVation Innovation Events Partner Events Media News & Events Press Releases Clippings Publications Newsletter WSA Global Congress in Vienna Scaling Digital Solutions: For People & Planet May 19-22 | Vienna, Austria The WSA Global Congress is coming home to its roots in Austria! Expect to make valuable connections, learn new perspectives, and to plug in to a community that believes tech can bring about positive change. Connecting all of that with the agenda 2030 and an ongoing cooperation with the UN, the WSA Global Congress connects digital innovation directly to the achievement of the UN Global Goals , turning mindful ideas into measurable global impact. Get your tickets! Main Event Get your tickets for Day 1 and 2, which will be focused on networking, knowledge exchange, and the winner pitches. Day 1 and 2 Deep Dive Day Get your tickets for day 3, a smaller, more specialized final-day program offering participants hands-on workshops or thematic discussions tailored to democracy innovation or startup scaling challenges. Day 3 Topics Agenda Winners Key Participants Barbara Novak welcome statement Why Vienna Visas Partners Topics Digital Sovereignty vs. AI | Control, Choice, Community AI is shaping how we work, learn, and promises great solutions. But digital sovereignty is slipping: control sits far from the people affected, and systems built without transparency or diversity restrict our choices and weaken trust. Let’s discuss what could change when communities reclaim agency over their data, tools, and decisions and how AI can be built with accountability, equity, and shared governance at the core. Global Impact Solutions | Built for Real Needs Impact startups are building the solutions we urgently need - tackling climate, inclusion, education, and health - but often struggle to gain funding and support in systems copying Silicon Valley standards. Let’s share best practices how to level the playing field and support founders and their ventures built for real need. Let’s learn how about their value for communities, not just shareholders, and ensure the digital economy serves everyone. Building Digital Public Goods | Meeting Community Demands Digital public infrastructure provides access to services, opportunities and participation, however yet many communities, especially in rural or marginalized areas, remain excluded. When essential tools are privately owned or unevenly deployed, digital divides deepen. Let’s hear global perspectives how we build shared digital foundations that are open, inclusive, ensuring everyone can benefit from and contribute to the digital future. Five tech giants shouldn’t define our digital lives, own our data and choices. It’s time to pause, reflect and reset. From May 19–22, 2026, Vienna will prove that Digital without Harm is possible, welcoming 500+ changemakers from 90+ countries. Renowned for its commitment to digital humanism , the city offers the perfect backdrop to explore how technology can be ethical, inclusive, and human-centered. Set within ViennaUP , Central Europe’s largest startup and innovation festival, participants will have access to a wide range of events, gatherings, and networking opportunities, connecting with innovators, policymakers, and impact-driven founders from around the world. Vienna is consistently ranked one of the most livable cities in the world, with excellent public transport, vibrant culture, historic architecture, and world-class food and coffee — the congress is the perfect occasion to finally (re)visit this city. title: { founders only }
descriptionFull:
{ founders only } is not just another conference. It’s a space for 250 startup founders who’ve lived the rollercoaster of building something real.

No pitching. No sales. Zero fluff.

Only growth and scale founders who’ve raised or earned €500k+, coming together for honest conversations about the ups and downs of the founder journey.

Through panel talks with exited and experienced founders, hands-on workshops, and genuine peer connections, this { founders only } event creates a founder-to-founder experience like no other. Learn directly from your peers and gain practical tools and proven strategies to scale sustainably, building stronger businesses with lasting success.

Expect raw insights, shared struggles, and personal breakthroughs around mental health, responsible leadership, and wealth that’s more than numbers.

This is where Europe’s growth and scale founders meet eye to eye, a chance to step out of the hustle and reconnect with purpose, balance, and people who truly get it.
